description: Establishing a direction and vision for an organization. This involves defining the business concept and long-term vision, as well as developing the business 战略 and managing strategic initiatives. Processes in this category focus on creating a vision, a mission, and strategic objectives, and culminate in creating measures to ensure that the organization is moving in the desired direction.
name: 制定愿景与战略

description: Creating a conceptual framework of the organization's business activity and strategic vision with long-term applicability. Scout the organization's internal capabilities, as well as the customer's needs and desires, to identify a fit that can be used to advance a conceptual structure of the organization's business activity. 开展 analysis in light of relevant externalities and large-scale shifts in the market landscape.
name: 定义 the business concept and long-term vision

description: Assessing all forces, entities, and systems that are external to an organization but can affect its operation. 分析 far-reaching currents in the macroeconomic situation, assess the competition, evaluate technological 变更s, and identify societal as well as ecological issues of concern. 创建 a big-picture understanding of externalities, with sufficient depth across individual aspects.
name: 评估 the external environment

description: Identifying your competitors, their service and/or product. Evaluating competitors strategies to determine their strengths and weaknesses relative to those of your own product or service.
name: 识别 competitors

description: Assessing the competitive forces in the marketplace that could potentially affect the organization. 分析 various aspects of business competition including competing firms. Aggregate competitive intelligence, create benchmarks to juxtapose processes and 绩效 metrics, and inject crucial information about the competition into management 模型s to synthesize insights.
name: 分析 and evaluate competition

description: Examining if there are other existing products or services in the marketplace, and building the business case to make a go/no go decision based upon substitutions.
name: 识别 potential product or service alternatives

description: Determining large-scale macroeconomic shifts and trends, with medium to long-term relevance for the organization. Vet the immediate and the larger economic ecosystem to identify broad-based movements that affect the organization. In the immediate vicinity, for example, examine the stock price of key vendors/suppliers in the organizational value-chain. In the larger economic ecosystem, analyze according to geographical distribution where factors such as interest rates, taxation structures, oil prices, and unemployment rates are explored.
name: 识别 economic trends

description: Identifying areas of concern pertaining to public policy and regulation, established by sovereign or multinational authorities. Examine various regions and geopolitical formations to identify those political and regulatory issues-present or developing-that can potentially affect the organization. 规划 for an iterative process, partitioned across regional and geopolitical entities that have a direct bearing on the organization's activities. 评估 变更s in environmental 合规, product standards, trade barriers, etc.
name: 识别 political and regulatory factors

description: Identifying 变更s in ecological ecosystems that can be directly or indirectly detrimental to the organization. 分析 ecological factors within the immediate ecosystem for near to middle-term impact. Analyze the ecology, at large, to get a sense of long-term shifts and concerns. Gather analyses from research publications. Speak to subject matter experts. Engage with advocacy groups, lawyers, journalists, and the active populations.
name: 识别 environmental factors

description: Distinguishing 变更s in societal makeup, as well as the cultural composite. Isolate shifts in the societal composition and distribution, as well as the value systems and attributes that bind the organization together. 分析 well-regarded publications--and gather the perspective of public intellectuals and opinion leaders--on relevant issues.
name: 识别 social and cultural 变更s

description: Assessing developments in technologies presently being used by the business, new technologies that have a potential for the business, and any disruptive 创新s. 开展 a survey of advancement in technologies that are already deployed with inputs from the personnel closely working with them, tracking utility and feasibility for 部署. Arrange for mid- to senior-level management personnel who explore contingent uses to assess new and disruptive technologies. Follow up with desk research, involving physical scoping and viability assessment.
name: 评估 new technologies

description: Analyzing statistical data relating to the size, distribution, and composition of relevant populations, as well as their characteristics. Perform quantitative analysis over raw data-sets gathered from well-founded sources such as government census or large, private databases. Consider employing primary research in collecting required statistics. Use comprehensive studies (reports, briefs, and articles) to assist with the analysis, in place of raw data.
name: 分析 demographics

description: Establishing measures and procedures for identifying various intellectual property threats and concerns.
name: 评估 intellectual property

description: Examining the market to identify customer required solutions. 评估 the relevant market(s) to determine the products/services that are needed or wanted by customers. Carry out quantitative and qualitative analyses to capture and investigate products/services. Employ creative techniques that allow for a closer appreciation of the customer, and design relevant solutions.
name: Survey market and determine customer needs and wants

description: Investigating key market features and customer characteristics, using qualitative and quantitative measures to capture relevant aspects. Distill key ingredients that allow the organization to 采集 customer needs and wants [19946], and 评估 customer needs and wants [19947]. 开展 standardized appraisals by defining selection parameters and setting quotas.
name: 开展 qualitative/quantitative research and assessments

description: Identifying and collecting customers' wants and needs of a product and/or services from a marketing perspective. 识别 which consumer needs are important and whether needs are being met by current products/services.
name: 采集 customer needs and wants

description: Creating customer profiles to get a picture of customers and their needs. 识别 particular groups of people/organizations that benefit from your product/services and then selling to them.
name: 评估 customer needs and wants

description: Undertaking a review of the organization's in-house skills and resources in order to create a big-picture understanding of internal capacities. 评估 the organization's capabilities in order to advance the advantageous and weed out the detrimental aspects. 识别 synergic associations within the backdrop of the forces and players active in the market, and take into account all externalities.
name: 评估 the internal environment

description: Identifying and examining key attributes that differentiate the organization in the market and those that underscore the core of its operations. Consider how the organization functions. Reflect over tangible and intangible aspects in order to spot critical correlations and the interplay between these attributes. Have senior executives conduct the analysis, with input from management and operational personnel.
name: 分析 organizational characteristics

description: 识别 key elements of operations and measure effectiveness of these elements within internal operations.
name: 分析 internal operations

description: Establishing baselines that provide standards for assessing 绩效 levels and allow for a relational benchmarking of current processes. Undertake a survey of archival 绩效 records, conducted in conjunction by the management and the operations personnel. Take into account the organization's internal objectives, particularly for process improvement and enhancement. Understand industry best practices.
name: 创建 baselines for current processes

description: Analyzing the capabilities of technology and process 自动化 systems deployed within the organization in order to direct future associated processes. 开展 a broad-based survey to examine various aspects associated with such systems and technologies, with the objective of identifying key facets that are of interest. Investigate the intended purpose, purpose served, utility, longevity, remaining service-life, repair or service requirements, etc.
name: 分析 systems and technology

description: Appraising the financial state of the organization so that management can create resource allocation strategies. Scrutinize the organization's financials--including balance sheets, statements of income, cash-flows, equity holdings, and liquidity--with the objective of understanding the organization's financial health and capacities. (This analysis directly feeds into 开展 organizational restructuring opportunities [16792] and 定义 a business concept and long-term vision [17040].)
name: 分析 financial health

description: Determining a strategically significant aggregate of competence and capacities that differentiates the organization in the market. 识别 distinguishing attributes including unique skills and resources and its brand and services in the marketplace. Have senior executives and management personnel assess competencies in order to further develop these capabilities into distinct commercial value propositions.
name: 识别 core competencies

description: Establishing the organization's long-term vision as a strategic positioning and engagement of stakeholders. Institute the vision by creating strategic orientations of all stakeholders. Understand the 战略 development frameworks in this context.
name: 建立 strategic vision

description: Developing goals to define organizations vision. 定义 and document ideas, direction, and activities which enable the organization to reach these goals.
name: 定义 the strategic vision

description: Orienting those entities, associated with the organization that have a direct bearing on its operations and output, in a way that advances its strategic vision. Map all stakeholders in strategic 配置s, within the architectural layout of the marketplace, and position the organization relative to them. (This exercise is undertaken by senior 战略 personnel, drawing upon the process 定义 a business concept and long-term vision [17040].)
name: Align stakeholders around strategic vision

description: Developing and executing communication strategies to convey an 对齐 plan of all organizational stakeholders, which helps the organization realize its vision. 创建 custom communication strategies and delivery channels with the objective of orienting stakeholders according to the 配置 maps created in the process Align stakeholders around a strategic vision [10035]. Have senior 战略 personnel closely collaborate with the communications/marketing team.
name: Communicate strategic vision to stakeholders

description: Examining the scope and contingencies for restructuring based on market situation and internal realities. Map the market forces over which any and all probabilities can be probed for utility and viability. Once the restructuring options have been analyzed and the due-diligence performed, execute the deal. Consider seeking professional services for assistance in formalizing these opportunities.
name: 开展 organization restructuring opportunities

description: Identifying opportunities for restructuring the organization, through an analysis of internal viability and external contingency. 开展 a broad-based survey of the market landscape, taking the large-scale trends and movements into account, to determine the necessity and possibility of restructuring the organization. 审查 the organization's internal capacities, the readiness of its process frameworks, the robustness of its financials, the capableness of its systems, the resourcefulness of its personnel, etc. for assimilating an extensive overhaul.
name: 识别 restructuring opportunities

description: Auditing the status quo of the probabilities, before formalizing any restructuring of the organization with another entity. Systematically investigate all entities discerned to be of interest in 识别 restructuring opportunities [16793], to verify all tangible and substantial facts. Consider engaging specialist professional services including legal, accounting, and consulting help.
name: Perform due-diligence

description: Examining various options shortlisted for assimilating new entities into the organization or dissociating from it. Undertake a piecemeal and comprehensive consideration of each option identified for acquisition, merger, de-merger, and divestment. Consider intangible and non-material aspects of the entities involved and synergic aspects. Consider the assistance of specialist professional services.
name: 分析 deal options

description: Appraising entities identified as being suitable for acquisition, taking into account the restructuring opportunities in the internal and external context. 验证 the appropriateness and viability of the short-listed options. Ensure these entities pertain to the state-of-affairs in the market, as well as fit with the resources and capabilities of the organization.
name: 评估 acquisition options

description: Appraising entities identified as being suitable for a merger, taking stock of the restructuring opportunities within the firm and the market. 验证 the appropriateness and viability of such options. 评估 these entities to ensure their pertinence to the contextual state-of-affairs in the market, as well as a fit with the resources and capabilities of the organization itself. (This process can be carried out, in its entirety, by qualified in-house personnel or may be designated to specialist professional services providers.)
name: 评估 merger options

description: Evaluating departments and subsidiaries within the organization, and/or previously merged entities, to assess the appropriateness of a de-merger, taking account of the fit between these entities as well as any relevant externalities. Examine the pertinence and soundness of a formalized dissociation.
name: 评估 de-merger options

description: Evaluating departments and/or subsidiaries within the organization to assess the appropriateness of a divestment, taking account of all market externalities. Examine any internal entities that have been identified to be suitable for dismemberment from the organization. Ensure the pertinence and soundness of such a move.
name: 评估 divesture options

description: AI-era activity: AI-Powered Market Analysis.
name: AI-Powered Market Analysis

description: Developing an organization's mission statement, 战略, and business design. 创建 a concise statement that clearly articulates the mission of the organization, outlining practicable targets to 建立 a strategic vision [10020]. Delineate strategic options by matching these alternatives with the organization's internal capabilities. Create an organizational design, and identify goals by developing strategies at the functional and process levels.
name: 开发 business 战略

description: Establishing an overarching, compact statement that concisely underscores the mission of the organization. 定义 and communicate a clear and succinct mission statement, which encapsulates how the organization aims to proceed in order to 建立 a strategic vision [10020]. Solicit critical inputs from senior management and 战略 executives, and collaborate with marketing or personnel from allied functions.
name: 开发 overall mission statement

description: Defining the status quo relating to the de facto core of what the business is. Reflect over the fundamental essence of what the business accomplishes and the manner in which it operates. Look beyond the obvious solution capabilities to delineate capacities that form the basis of the business engine. Involve senior executives and management personnel and possibly professional services providers.
name: 定义 current business

description: Outlining actionable objectives that effectively set a course to fulfill the organization's vision. In this fundamental activity, articulate certain goals or targets in broad but practicable terms to reach long-term objectives.
name: Formulate mission

description: Developing and executing a communication 战略 to convey the mission statement. 创建 a universal communication 战略 and appropriate delivery channels, with the objective of leveraging the latter to execute the former. Convey the inherent message of the mission to all stakeholders, including employees, customers, and the public. Ensure collaboration between senior 战略 personnel and the communications/marketing team.
name: Communicate mission

description: Assessing sets of strategic decisions designed to drive the organization's long-term objectives. 识别 various strategies concerning core functional areas. Appraise strategic options in light of auxiliary decision frameworks that ensure smooth functioning, the advancement of functional efficiencies, and vitality. Involve senior management executives, especially 战略 and/or business unit personnel, with need-based consultative assistance from professional services providers.
name: 定义 and evaluate strategic options to achieve the mission

description: Defining the various options available to achieve the goals highlighted in the mission statement. Delineate (in accordance with a predefined criteria) the various permutations of strategic decisions that would help the organization achieve the objectives outlined in 开发 overall mission statement [10037]. Involve senior management and key 战略 personnel, with timely help from professional services providers.
name: 定义 strategic options

description: Supporting the design, manufacture and distribution of product and services through the extended enterprise 模型.  This is concerned with the strategic decisions on make vs buy, in house or out sourced.  Senior Executives map out how they want to run their business.  Make strategic choices as to whether to buy in components / sub-assemblies, run their own distribution fleet or contract out, own their dealerships or franchise out, etc.  Strategize with partnerships. Collaborate design consideration at 战略 level for automotive and procurement act within the Target Operating 模型 set at 战略 level.
name: 选择 partnerships and relationships to support the extended enterprise

description: Scoping and probing to study the impact of strategic options for fulfilling the organization's objectives. Estimate a measure of the impact effectuated by each set of strategic decisions, which comprise 定义 strategic options [10047]. Closely examine the consequences of each option.
name: 评估 and analyze impact of each option

description: Determine impacts of elements such as staffing, skills, 训练, new markets, technology, or policies within operating 模型 which needs 变更.
name: 识别 implications for key operating 模型 business elements that require 变更

description: Determining key factors for technology ROI, benefits, architecture, etc.
name: 识别 implications for key technology aspects

description: Evaluating future business to business opportunities against past and current approaches and 绩效. Gather insights into what competitors and other similar organizations are doing and the needs, goals, and expectations of stakeholders and partners to understand potential future impact.
name: 评估 B2B options

description: Evaluating future business to customer opportunities against past and current approaches and 绩效. Gather insights into what competitors and other similar organizations are doing and the needs, goals, and expectations of customers and partners to understand potential future impact.
name: 评估 B2C options

description: Evaluating partnership and alliance opportunities to deliver products/services. Understand existing product and market 模型s in use across the markets you serve, evolving trends, and the cost/benefit of potential new/updated partnership/alliance options.
name: 评估 partner/alliance options

description: Evaluating intellectual property acquisition options available to scale, modernize, and/or extend product/service reach. Understand the cost, 风险, timing and lifecycle value of candidate acquisitions.
name: 评估 IP acquisition options

description: Evaluating 创新 options to advance technology, products/services, and/or operational 绩效.
name: 评估 创新 options

description: Evaluating 可持续发展 requirements, stakeholder expectations, and value proposition for options. Understand the potential activities and 变更s across environmental, social, and 治理, the effort required, cost to implement, and benefits gained. The analysis should consider sustainable product/service lifecycles, operations, 基础设施, 绩效, and workforce.
name: 评估 可持续发展 options

description: Evaluating options for global support services and functions. This should include structure, scale, adaptability to 变更, and alternative delivery 模型s to balance cost, 绩效, and customer value.
name: 评估 global support options

description: Evaluating options for shared services and support functions. This should include structure, scale, adaptability to 变更, and alternative delivery 模型s to balance cost, 绩效, and operational efficiencies.
name: 评估 shared services options

description: Evaluating options to enhance and optimize processes and functional areas. Understand alternatives to strengthen 业务能力, enhance process efficiencies, and advance 绩效 standards.
name: 评估 lean/continuous improvement options

description: Developing a 战略 for the achievement of business goals over the distant future. Adopt one of the strategic options for realizing its mission over the long term. Enlist senior management executives, comprising 战略 and/or business unit personnel.
name: Set/开发 long-term enterprise 战略

description: Defining direction and plan objectives for partnering with other companies to deliver product/services. Focus on creating a vision and strategic objectives and culminate in creating measures for the strategic alliance or partnership.
name: 开发 partner/alliance 战略

description: Formulating strategic options that create opportunities for the sustenance and prosperity of the business in the long run. Go beyond business longevity to consider alternate strategies that allow the organizations preservation of vitality over time. Earmark resources and target processes, the former of which are dedicated to the absorption of sustainable practices in the latter.
name: 开发 可持续发展 战略

description: Defining a 战略 for corporate development. Include providing a framework for evaluating merger and acquisition candidates; and planning for a value creation through merging/demerging with a company, acquiring a company, or exiting from an already merged/acquired company.
name: 开发 merger/demerger/acquisition/exit 战略

description: Developing a plan and vision to encourage advancements in technology or product/services. 创建 a roadmap for changing or innovating the business 模型 to make business operations more competitive. Set up new R&D services for changing or bringing new value propositions, services, production processes, and invention of technology not previously used by competitors etc.
name: 开发 创新 战略

description: Developing a plan to deploy support services and support functions throughout the organization globally. Arrange the organizations functional support areas to create efficiencies of scale in the delivery of support services, globally.
name: 开发 global support 战略

description: Charting a plan to leverage internal services and support functions throughout the organization. Delineate a framework of parameters and criteria to selectively filter service areas for inclusion among the organizations common resources. Arrange the organizations functional areas to create efficiencies of scale in the delivery of internal services.
name: 开发 shared services 战略

description: Developing strategies for the optimization of processes and the improvement of functional areas in order to improve the bottom line. 创建 a road map of decision choices that would allow the organization to continuously enhance process efficiencies and advance 绩效 standards.
name: 开发 lean/continuous improvement 战略

description: Aligning the approach and method of individual units, departments, systems, and operations within the organization, in accordance with the larger strategic course adopted. Employ the organization's strategic path to guide the functions, divisions, and operations. Calibrate the plan and method of each functional area, as well as the processes therein, to 选择 the long-term business 战略 [10039].
name: 协调 and align cross-functional and process strategies

description: Formulating a design for the organization's resources that allow it to meet its objectives. 开发 a new framework for molding the organization's various processes into a coherent and seamless whole.
name: 创建 organizational design

description: Evaluating the structural makeup of the organization, including pertinent features of and associated synergies among constituent elements. Examine the organization's architectural framework, paying close attention to the individual elements, the relations among them, and the conjoint and co-acting forces therein. 分析 functions and processes, as well as work-related positions. Scrutinize various relevant characteristics associated with each of them, depending upon the scale, scope, and type of organization.
name: 评估 breadth and depth of organizational structure

description: Appraising job-specific roles within the organizational chart and their hierarchical architecture. 分析 a map of work-related roles within the organizational structure. Examine the value added by the positions associated with jobs to be performed and how they stack up within the organization's operations.
name: Perform job-specific roles mapping and value-added analyses

description: Examining the constituent exercises and undertakings within a work-related position for the purpose of effective delegation. Deconstruct job-specific roles into activities and visualize the relations among them, with the objective of assigning responsibilities to the appropriate personnel.
name: 开发 role activity diagrams to assess hand-off activity

description: Organizing workshop sessions to adopt organizational redesign. Communicate the organizational structure and mapping of responsibilities against job roles in order to facilitate an effective understanding among personnel. Use a collaborative process that may include participative workshop sessions.
name: Perform organization redesign workshops

description: Fleshing out the connections and dependencies among the various units of the organization. Delineate the relationship among business units or process frameworks within the organization, in terms of activities, synergies, and shared resources and responsibilities. Formalize relationships among business units so that any mutual coherence is clearly understood and can be attended to.
name: 设计 the relationships between organizational units

description: Creating an understanding of the fit between job roles and organizational processes in order to properly place personnel. Deconstruct key processes into constituent activities, and examine job-related roles. Take cues from 开发 role activity diagrams to assess hand-off activity [10051]. Map appropriate positions against these important processes, which in turn expedite the 部署 of staff members.
name: 开发 role analysis and activity diagrams for key processes

description: Probing the repercussions of all practicable organizational design options. 分析 the significance and impact of workable organizational structure options. Closely examine the long-term impact of these frameworks over the functioning of the organization.
name: 评估 organizational implication of feasible alternatives

description: Embracing and ratifying a new organizational structure. (Assume the new framework to be the best fit through 评估 the organizational implications of feasible alternatives [10055].)
name: Migrate to new organization

description: Developing overall goals for the organization that help in accomplishing its mission. Formulate organization-wide targets in the near to middle term, which will accumulate and propel the organization to realize its long-term objectives, as outlined in 开发 an overall mission statement [10037]. Enlist business unit heads or equivalent personnel, in close collaboration with senior management executives.
name: 开发 and set organizational objectives

description: Creating and developing strategic objectives that establishes a process to outline expected outcomes and guide employees' efforts.
name: 识别 organizational objectives

description: Establishing baselines that provide standards for assessing 绩效. 创建 metrics and KPI's for various functions/processes/activities based on organizational goals.
name: 建立 baseline metrics

description: Defining methodology and frequency of assessment for measuring and 监控 绩效 of various functions/processes/activities against standard set goals.
name: 监控 绩效 against objective

description: Charting a strategic course for business units in order to leverage opportunities, sidestep hurdles, and create synergies among each other. 创建 strategic road maps for the organization's units--in light of their individual resources and requirements, as well as their relationships with other business units--to achieve organizational goals.
name: Formulate business unit strategies

description: Assessing the 绩效 of a business unit against set organizational goals which are based on pre-defined metrics collected through various business unit operations.
name: 分析 business unit strategies

description: Determining the resources and skills of each business unit based on knowledge and technical 容量. Enable business units to meet customer needs and grow in a competitive marketplace.
name: 识别 core competency for each business unit

description: Evaluating existing business unit 战略 based on the company's 战略 and eliminate unwanted/unnecessary resources/elements and re-consider necessary resources to meet the overall company's 战略.
name: Refine business unit strategies in support of organizational 战略

description: Defining a roadmap to meet customer expectations while considering how it will affect the business.
name: 开发 customer experience 战略

description: Measuring customer feedback in regard to product and services effectiveness based on overall satisfaction. The data to be analyzed is collected through surveys, customer responses, and feedbacks based on the delivered products/services.
name: 评估 customer experience

description: Creating methods to gauge customer experiences, expectations, and suggestions. 审查 both liked and disliked areas of product/services to be delivered. 评估 touchpoints based on the nature of product/service in the market e.g., billboards, web sites, direct mail, service calls, etc.
name: 识别 and review customer touchpoints

description: Evaluating customer experiences, expectations, and suggestions in both liked and disliked areas of the product or services. 分析 all modes of communication, human and physical interactions, or customers experience during the relationship lifecycle with your organization. 评估 the gaps/further development/alterations to the existing product/service to attain better customer response.
name: 评估 customer experience across touchpoints

description: Analyzing the core reason for the customer experience/feedback/response about the product/service to take considerable action for better customer experience.
name: Perform root cause analysis of 问题atic customer experiences

description: Creating a design of how customers interact with the business by analyzing data captured through various customer interaction and customer involvement. These will be captured through various channels such as customer satisfaction surveys, feedback forms, product reviews, targeted studies, observational studies, or voice of customer research.
name: 设计 customer experience

description: Identifying a set of characteristics that define the demographic and behavioral patterns of the customer. Further, use persona scoring to design your marketing strategies around personas, and measure and optimize your interactions with the contacts classified by a certain persona.
name: 定义 and manage personas

description: Creating a story of the customer's experience: from initial contact, through the process of engagement and into a long-term relationship. The goal is to teach organization about the customer.
name: 创建 customer journey maps

description: Defining parameters to show aggregated, consistent, and holistic representation of known data about customers. 定义 key parameters which enable the tracking of customers and communications across every channel.
name: 定义 single view of the customer for the organization

description: Establishing a direction and vision on how the organization behaves towards customers in a consistent, effective way. The key attributes for customer experience vision consists of emotional connection, commitments and expectations, compelling value proposition, and ease of understanding the organization's behavior.
name: 定义 a vision for the customer experience

description: Creating a process to validate the sales process and the assumptions that underpin the business 模型. Understand if the products/services have a repeatable, scalable business 模型 around that product.
name: 验证 with customers

description: Aligning and defining a relevant, differentiated, and credible value proposition for the brand. Align experience to ensure that the product and service 质量 is consistent with brand promise and business strategies.
name: Align experience with brand values and business strategies

description: Planning, development, and management of content-written or in other media. Getting the right content to the right user at the right time through strategic planning of content creation, delivery, and 治理.
name: 开发 content 战略

description: Creating a roadmap for customer experience support with an overall approach, process flow, and impact timeframe.
name: 设计 customer experience support structure

description: Determining the necessary skills and competencies required to efficiently collect customer experiences through the support structure.
name: 识别 required capabilities

description: Identifying the affect of customer experience through customer experience support structure on other functions of 客户服务s related to customer.
name: 识别 impact on functional processes

description: Defining a standard guideline to create and execute the capacities of registering customer experiences in a timely manner. 创建 a common understanding of what behaviors are required to implement the 战略. 定义 what talent/skills your organization needs to reach customer experience goals.
name: 开发 customer experience roadmap to develop and implement defined capabilities

description: Conveying planned procedures and methods to both internal departments and external stakeholders like customers, suppliers, etc., in an effective manner based on organizational objective.
name: Communicate strategies internally and externally

description: AI-era activity: AI-Driven Scenario Planning.
name: AI-Driven Scenario Planning

description: Managing strategic initiatives, from development through selection, execution, and evaluation. 开展 and oversee strategic projects supporting long-term objectives. Administer programs of strategic significance by developing such initiatives, select the most appropriate projects, and formulate measures to assess their impact.
name: 开发 and measure strategic initiatives

description: Developing strategic projects that help fulfill long-term goals. 开发 time-bound projects that are discretionary in nature and lie beyond the scope of the organization's routine operations.
name: 开发 strategic initiatives

description: Creating a statement of the organization's direction to guide decision making around the allocation of resources. 提供 a focus on the organization's overarching goals to ensure coherent and considered action. Strategic objectives are ranked by their importance in achieving the strategic goals. All subsequent operational or tactical planning and resource allocation is based on strategic priorities
name: 识别 strategic priorities

description: Creating a statement of the organization's direction based on what is considered "value" to the customer or business.
name: 开发 strategic initiatives based on business/customer value

description: Developing a process for stakeholder dialog that is integrated into the assessment of business strategies. 报告 on the evaluation of the business objectives, strategies, subject, or past events.
name: 审查 with stakeholders

description: Examining projects of strategic significance that lie outside the purview of the organization's routine operations. Closely analyze strategic initiatives for their applicability and feasibility, given the organization's vision.
name: 评估 strategic initiatives

description: Establishing a standard measure of value to determine the business worth for each of the 识别 strategic priorities [19975]. List the effectiveness and utility for every important strategic element based on the benefit it adds to the business.
name: Determine business value for each strategic priority

description: Analyzing the value preposition; the value the customer gets from a product/services for each of your 识别 strategic priorities [19975]. Customer value is the satisfaction a consumer feels after making a purchase for goods or services relative to what he/she must give up to receive them.
name: Determine the customer value for each strategic priority

description: Selecting relevant projects of strategic significance that create opportunities for the organization to realize its long-term objectives, on the basis of their suitability to the organization's constraints and reality. 选择 from the process 评估 strategic initiatives [10058], based on their applicability and feasibility for the organization. Enlist senior management, especially 战略 personnel.

description: Devising measures to examine strategic projects. Formulate evaluation criteria to assess the strategic initiatives for the level of impact.

Revise the plan as required to reflect changing circumstances.
name: 开发 and maintain business 模型s

This involves information gathering, securing necessary approvals and authorizations, integrating with preexisting 模型s, including the general business concept [10002] and business 战略 [10015], and formally accepting the 模型 as the basis for organization's day-to-day operations.
name: 开发 business 模型s

description: Collecting all relevant materials needed to develop the business 模型, so that it can adequately 模型 its processes.

name: 排定优先级 and manage incoming feedback

description: ITIL 4 practice: 战略 Management. Mapped to 开发 愿景与战略.
name: 战略 Management

name: 定义 IT 战略 对齐

description: Activity within ITIL practice '战略 Management'.
name: 评估 strategic options

description: Activity within ITIL practice '战略 Management'.
name: 执行 strategic initiatives

description: Detailing practices and procedures related to the concept of developing and managing 产品和服务. These are reflected in the process groups 治理 and manage product/service development program [19696], Generate and define new product/service ideas [19698], and 开发 产品和服务 [10062].
name: 开发与管理产品和服务

description: Supervising the complete product/service program from 创新 until its commercial success. Meeting the customer demand and expectations. 开展 further development and 创新 pertaining to business goals.
name: 治理 and manage product/service development program

Revisit the product/service portfolio in light of market opportunities, and overhaul it to capture value created by these opportunities. 识别 gaps between current offerings and the market expectations to direct the organization's R&D activity. 创建 new solutions, and revise or retire existing ones so that the revamped portfolio aligns with 开发 a business 战略 [10015].
name: 管理 product and service portfolio

description: Assessing the capabilities and 绩效 of existing products/services, in light of market opportunities. Examine 绩效 of the existing line of products/services, including measures of profitability, penetration, and value delivered. 识别 gaps between existing solutions' portfolio or their 绩效 levels, on the one hand, and the current market demand, available technologies, and/or customer expectations, on the other. Consider opportunities in the present market environment and any relation with the 绩效. Consider input from professional services providers.
name: 评估 绩效 of existing products/services against market opportunities

description: Checking the 对齐 of product/service portfolio, and its individual offerings, with the organization's overall 战略 and planning for the development of new or revised solutions. 开展 reality checks on new product/service concepts prior to committing significant investment to ensure that the revamped solutions' portfolio is in line with the overall business 战略, aligns organizational processes for their development, and creates a plan for assimilating these 变更s in the organization's offerings. Enlist senior management executives.
name: Confirm 对齐 of product/service concepts with business 战略

description: Selecting from among the potential new/revised solutions and capitalizing on market opportunities so that they meet the cost and 质量 prerequisites. 创建 an index of product/service concepts, and arrange them in order of preference. Base prioritization on adherence to 规划 and develop cost and 质量 targets [10073], and choose options that would comprise the revised solution portfolio.

description: Setting prerequisites for the cost of development and 质量 standards for the new solutions' portfolio and/or its individual offerings. Set targets for the budget and 质量 standards for the revamped portfolio of solution offerings. 准备 a plan for the outlay required for revising and adding new product/services. 识别 intended levels of 质量 for these, bearing in mind the existing standards of solutions offered by the organization and its competitors. name: 规划 and develop cost and 质量 targets

description: Determining the individual and collective timeframe for realizing new/revised solutions. 创建 a schedule that clearly demarcates the timeframes designated for the development of every new solution and/or revising each of the existing ones. description: Developing a programmatic procedure for changing products/services while paying heed to all stakeholders involved and the prerequisites identified. 创建 a plan for changing the existing portfolio of solution offerings. 开发 a systematic program for the design, processing, and delivery of the new product/service concepts. Construct project-flow diagrams. 识别 the stakeholders involved and personnel responsible for each stage, as well as the necessary decisions. Earmark the budgetary outlay, and conduct any strategic planning required.
name: 规划 for product/service offering modifications

description: 管理 the introduction and withdrawal of products/services. Administer associated 变更s, namely measuring the 绩效 of new solution offerings and the revision of master files in the archives.
name: 管理 product and service life cycle

description: Developing a program and managing a perspective for new product/service introduction and launch.
name: 开发 plan for new product/service development and introduction/launch

description: Launching revamped product/service portfolio in to the market. Introduction in to the marketplace is done by deploying effective channels for marketing, sales, delivery, and after-sales servicing. Introduce new/revised solution offerings in a concerted effort. 协调 a cross-functional effort.
name: Introduce new products/services

description: Removing nonconforming 产品和服务. Withdraw those products/services that do not conform to market realities and are not positioned to take advantage of prevailing opportunities. 协调 with processing/delivery teams within the organization and key stakeholders in the 供应链. 创建 mechanisms for continued after-sales servicing, as well as deploy effective public relations efforts in order to preserve the image and goodwill of the organization through the process.

description: Attuning the 绩效 measures of products/services to better reflect the revamped portfolio of solution offerings. Revise the parameters used to measure 绩效, apropos the organization's product/service offerings. (Modify these standards in consideration of the 变更s made to the portfolio by Introduce new products/services [10077] and Retire outdated products/services [10078].)
name: 识别 and refine 绩效 indicators

description: Learning from either a test or a full production run within the consumer market. Companies use this as an opportunity to both test and react to new products, ideas, or 创新s based on the initial reaction of consumers on an individual level. Within this process, analytics are used to determine the relative success of a new product offering. Within this process, companies will launch key analytics to test a products acceptance. They will also review market 绩效 and compare to similar products and against the business case or the financial plan. Companies can also measure the effectiveness of their 供应链 network, and can apply what is learned from the post launch review to other new products, processes, and procedures to ensure and enhance the product 质量.
name: 开展 post launch review

description: Measuring the 绩效 of marketing once the product/services are launched. This broadly covers measuring user engagement and product's/service's 绩效 in the market.
name: Carry out post launch analytics to test the acceptability in the market

description: Conducting customer and market analysis to review progress and identify opportunities for increasing market position. 跟踪 and review product/service response through sales reports, website statistics, direct response from customers, and survey reports.
name: 审查 market 绩效

description: Determining the 绩效 of 供应链 to all departments and logistics from input to shop floor. Seeking 绩效 reviews at each intersection and communication channels. 审查 effectiveness of 供应链 and distribution to check if it is meeting the demands of the various groups and organizations that are concerned with its activities (groups might include customers, partners, suppliers, and vendors).
name: 审查 effectiveness of 供应链 and distribution network

description: Collecting and examining raw data with the purpose of drawing conclusions about that information and correlate gaps and efficiencies to the existing 供应链 channels. Apply the information to make better business decisions to the related 供应链 methodologies to meet efficiency.
name: Apply data and analytics to review 供应链 methodologies

description: Identifying the 质量 and 绩效 of the product/service delivered to customers. 分析 data from the customer feedback, audits, measures of customer satisfaction (such as product 质量 complaints and recalls), and organizational policies on delivery.
name: 审查 质量 and 绩效 of the product/service

description: Evaluating organization's financial reports and financial reporting processes. 审查 and document the ROI catered by the product/service delivery to the customer in the market.
name: 开展 financial review

description: Analyzing the steps involved in the development of new product, its effect on existing product, resources, and functions related to the development of the new product until its sale in the competitive market place.
name: 开展 new product development process assessment

description: Determining the attributes necessary to protect and safeguard intellectual 资产, maximize the value of IP 资产 through streamlined process, and collaboration between departments. Focus on needs to safeguard, critical 资产, and 资产' value.
name: 管理 patents, copyrights, and regulatory requirements

description: Conducting necessary 绩效 reviews on enforcement of processes and steps to ensure protection. Determine policies and reviews for 管理 patents, copyrights, and regulatory requirements [19985].
name: 开展 mandatory and elective reviews

description: Reviewing activities in regards to patentability and infringement. The usage of Open Source in commercial product development will be reviewed in regard to licensing, community development, etc.

description: Determining the business need for patents and copyrights. The patents and copyrights are managed by 管理 copyrights and patents [11062].
name: Determine patent and copyright needs

description: Defining sourcing and procurement requirements for new product technical documentation management. Make sourcing-based decisions that identify the capabilities that will be required in order to launch the new product. This documentation will be used to support the product following entry into service. It is compiled and managed in 管理 product and process related data [12082], but the capability to manage and maintain this documentation must be defined and established.
name: 定义 product technical documentation management requirements

description: Aligning regulatory activities related to managing industry requirements. Train employees on regulatory requirements. Records for the appropriate regulatory agencies must be maintained and the new product process must be approved by the appropriate regulatory body before it is published to the organization. The submission lifecycle - i.e. creation, review, and approval of the submission and its components must be managed in a collaborative fashion.
name: 管理 regulatory requirements

description: Conducting 训练 and impart learning to existing and new employees. 训练 will relate to the most recent/enforced regulations of the business to meet 管理 regulatory requirements [12771].
name: Train employees on appropriate regulatory requirements

description: Identifying steps and procedures to manage and regularly update the records for regulatory agencies. Updates will be made to 安全 procedures, identity and access management, software tools and applications, internal accessibility policies, internal 质量 parameters, etc.

description: Determine and follow the timely input and update of regulatory information by assessing reforms, regulatory policies, and guidelines.

description: Controlling/authorizing to enable services' and products' data and other critical data of these functions through a well secured storage and accessibility processes backed by siloed applications/IT systems.

description: Controlling the details of materials' storage and utilization, supplier details linked to materials, in a defined sequential manner and ensuring regular updates with permissible accessibility.

description: Managing the purchase details/bills through regular and error free updates to applications. 创建 manual entries wherever necessary and ensure timely review of the laid processes and systems.

description: Controlling and executing the flow of operations from raw form to finished product in a defined format using industry applications/routing sheets for the specific product/service layout.
name: 管理 routings

description: Direct, supervise, and control the product/service details necessary to execute the process. Adhere to details and descriptions for product/service through identified or guided parameters towards final outcome in the market with due critical analysis formed on organizational objectives.
name: 管理 specifications

description: Administering the specifications of the product/service and ensure accessibility for product alteration/new product development.
name: 管理 drawings

description: Controlling the details of the product and the input materials. 管理 classification throughout the production process, and for future accessibility to new product development or product enrichment.
name: 管理 product/material classification

description: Determining procedures required to assess the 可持续发展 of defined criterion for product/service delivery to customers. Retain results for further review as a procedural practice.
name: 开发 and maintain 质量/inspection documents

description: Directing and handling data with respect to the procedures followed across different functions and mission critical applications.
name: 维护 process specification data

description: Identifying and handling data accessed by the permitted touch points. Ensure that no data is accessible to any unnecessary recipient. Data flow should be controlled through secured access and free from unauthorized access.
name: 管理 traceability data

description: Determining the requests pertaining to data accessibility. 审查 the requester details based on internal data 安全 policies and permit data access only if internal policies and data access parameters are met.
name: 审查 and approve data access requests

description: AI-era activity: AI-Powered Product 设计.
name: AI-Powered Product 设计

description: Identifying and describing new product or service thoughts based on organizational objectives/targets.
name: Generate and define new product/service ideas

description: Coordinating R&D activity to identify new technologies to integrate into the revamped portfolio of products/services. 开展 early-stage R&D activity to close gaps between existing solution offerings and changing market expectations. Triangulate appropriate technologies that can support the development of a revised product/service portfolio.

description: Determining new technologies to revise the portfolio of solution offerings. 识别 recently developed technological advances that can be leveraged in the development or advancement of the organization's product/service portfolio. Enlist senior management in conjunction with personnel responsible for the design, processing, and delivery of products/services. Have the organization's research division(s) carry out the process.

description: Developing new technologies from scratch to integrate into a revised portfolio of solutions. 开发 new technological processes, 模型s, and/or implements in-house, with the objective of improving existing solutions or creating new ones. Consider market realities, as well as the portfolio of products/services. 评估 the results in conjunction with senior executives and personnel responsible for the design, processing, and delivery of these solutions. Engage the R&D function, and consider external sources such as offshore providers, specialized research agencies, and crowdsourcing communities.

description: Appraising the feasibility of integrating new technologies, whether developed as a custom solution or adopted from an external source, into revised portfolio of solution offerings. Examine recently developed technological advances for suitability to incorporate them into the concept of revised and/or new solution offerings. Enlist senior management, in consultation with in-house personnel responsible for the design, processing, and delivery of these solutions, as well as key supply-chain stakeholders.

description: Producing and defining ideologies for new product/service offerings.

description: Collecting necessary items, documents, regulatory requirements, etc., based on Generate and define new product/service ideas [19698]

description: Assessing and reviewing the concepts and requirements of Generate and define new product/service ideas [19698]

description: Assessing and reviewing the required inputs and necessary elements such as 自动化, technology, hardware installation, regulatory requirements, certifications, etc., for new products/services through defined process and analysis.

description: Devising ideas and elements necessary for thoughts on new product/service development.

Collaborating with members of the 供应链 to ensure the feasibility of what is being defined in the requirements. For example, a product with manufacturing requirements that 供应链 cannot currently fulfill requires a corporate decision to either upgrade manufacturing capabilities or abandon the new product. Enterprise-level effects and needs must be considered. Depending on the nature of the final product or service, these requirements are often defined as a set of abilities, such as 可用性 or reliability, that influence product development decisions.

description: Determining requirements related to the creation of the product/service. Explain potential achievements that could be made.
name: 定义 product/service requirements

description: Determining the operations of functions related to the product/service in the marketing environment.
name: 定义 basic functional requirements

description: Determining the ability of 产品和服务 to work together, ex变更 and use information in a multi-vendor, multi-network, and multi-service environment.
name: Derive interoperability requirements for 产品和服务

description: Developing 安全 requirements in line with environmental 安全, occupational health and 安全, and community health and 安全 guidelines.
name: Derive 安全 requirements for 产品和服务

description: Implementing 安全 requirements through authentication and encryption of CE device data stream.  Utilize 安全 measures such as cryptographic protocols and hardware 安全 (smart cards).
name: Derive 安全 requirements for 产品和服务

description: Meeting regulatory requirements set forth by such directives as RoHS, WEEE, ELV, and REACH.
name: Derive regulatory 合规 requirements

description: Complying with consumer electronic industry standards developed by the Consumer Technology Association (CTA).
name: Derive requirements from industry standards

description: Identifying and creating steps and tools to develop the user experience.
name: 开发 user experience requirements

description: Productizing the service by defining the scope of the service/cost.  Target market for the service and make the service more tangible.
name: Derive ‘services-as-a-product’ offering

description: Defining SLAs (服务水平 Agreement) and 服务水平 KPIs (Key 绩效 Indicator).
name: 定义 post launch support 模型

description: Establishing areas of growth and further development of product/service mix, customization, market based 变更s, etc., to further demonstrate value to the customer in the competition.
name: 识别 product/service bundling opportunities

description: AI-era activity: Generative AI for Content Creation.
name: Generative AI for Content Creation

description: Developing new products/services from scratch, including all activities associated with the design, prototyping, evaluation, and market testing of these planned offerings.
name: 开发 产品和服务

description: Sketching and standardizing product and service based on the market. 分析 the data market competitiveness and 创新 attained for the product and service development.
name: 设计 and prototype 产品和服务

description: Allocating resources to the design, development, and evaluation of product/service concepts. Allocate funds, personnel, and time for developing the new and/or revised products/services. Begin to design the potential new product/service concepts that have been prioritized and selected for further development.
name: Assign resources to product/service project

description: Determining essential elements for collaborators involved in blueprint/development of product/service.
name: 识别 requirements for product/service design/development partners

description: Preparing a business-level business case and a technical feasibility assessment in order to move the product/service projects forward. Weigh the costs and benefits of designing, developing, and evaluating the shortlisted product/service concepts. 准备 a business case to justify the product/service projects. 开展 a technical appraisal to ensure that the organization has the technical know-how and resources to further develop these concepts.
name: 准备 high-level business case and technical assessment

description: Creating design specifications. 创建 specifications for the design of new or revised product/service concepts as a measure to meet during development. Have the senior functional-level solutioning or design staff create a framework of 合规 standards for these products/services.
name: 开发 product/service design specifications

description: Determining the usability and user experience of products and the business impact it creates.
name: 开发 user experience design specifications

description: Providing warranty plan and pricing specifications for recommendation.
