description: Documenting requirements to meet in the design of new or revised products/services. Specify technical, 质量, and costing requirements, as well as ergonomic, 安全, and servicing requirements for such products/services. Ensure the information presented can be understood by the personnel executing the design and includes examples, anecdotal references, and illustrations.
name: Document design specifications

description: Conducting any mandatory and elective appraisals of the product/service design specifications in order to ensure 合规 with external standards. Carry out external reviews of specifications created for the development of new product/service designs. 开展 mandatory appraisals such as legal and regulatory, as well as any optional assessments that, for instance, pitch the specifications against industrial benchmarks.
name: 开展 mandatory and elective external reviews

description: Creating a sketch of the customer focused product/service in 开发 and 管理 产品和服务 [10003].
name: 设计 products/services

description: Carrying out the steps necessary to appropriately manufacture correct parts.  This includes designing application, product hardware, mold, casting, mechanical, and electrical aspects of the product.
name: 设计 for manufacturing

description: Creating product application service view to allow for product servicing and refurbishing.
name: 设计 for product servicing

description: Replacing core components and republishing.
name: 设计 for re-manufacturing

description: Reviewing the design and approach for troubleshooting the product.
name: 审查 product troubleshooting methodology

description: Designing the BOM-Bill of material, manufacturing BOM and Service BOMA bill of materials list for all the raw materials and components/parts used in the producing end product.
name: 设计 and manage product data, design, and bill of materials

description: Designing hardware and software upgrade techniques.
name: 设计 for product upgrades

description: Building prototypes for shortlisted product/service concepts. 开发 prototypes for those product/service concepts that have been identified for further development. 提供 proof-of-concepts, and test any processes involved. 构建 prototypes in line with the design specifications already outlined. Enlist the solutioning and/or design staff.
name: 构建 prototypes/proof of concepts

description: Creating the new manufacturing/delivery processes for the new products/services, and testing them to ensure proper functioning. 创建 the production/delivery process for the prototypes that have been built for the new products/services. 开展 trial-runs to test these processes and their integration with the organization's other processes.
name: 开发 and test prototype production and/or service delivery process

description: Eliminating any 问题s relating to utility of the product/service over the course of its expected lifetime. Tweak the prototype in order to comply with the required 质量 and reliability standards. Further refine the prototype, so it may be subjected to testing.
name: Eliminate 质量 and reliability 问题s

description: Carrying out an in-house appraisal of the prototypes in order to validate design and feasibility. 测试 the product/service prototypes to confirm their 合规 with design and usability standards. Corroborate the viability of the design, and validate the feasibility of their production. 识别 any areas for improvement.
name: 开展 in-house product/service testing and evaluate feasibility

description: Identifying 绩效 parameters. Determine the parameters to measure 绩效 of the design and development of the product/service concepts into prototypes.
name: 识别 design/development 绩效 indicators

description: Interacting with suppliers and manufactures to determine design decisions. Collaborate with vendors, suppliers, contractors, and subcontractors to verify feasibility of co-producing the prototype's design. Ensure that efforts can be coordinated with other stakeholders in the organization's 供应链 ecosystem at the time of manufacturing, producing, or packaging the finished product/service.
name: Collaborate on design with suppliers and external partners

description: Expanding on the marketplace analysis that took place earlier in the product development lifecycle by testing the market against offerings. The results from this in-depth analysis will help the organization finalize product/service characteristics and technical requirements and also identify any needed 变更s in the manufacturing and delivery processes that support market delivery. To prepare a detailed market study that accounts for any 变更s in the global environment, the organization may want to conduct a series of interviews, workshops, and focus groups with potential and existing customers.
name: 测试 market for new or revised 产品和服务

description: Composing a detailed study of the market ecosystem in light of new products/services. 开展 a detailed analysis of the targeted market(s) in order to Introduce new products/services [10077]. Examine the competition, market size and growth rate, market trends, customer segments and their characteristics, market influencers, distribution channels, and profitability. Enlist in-house marketing and/or solutioning teams, or outsource to specialized professional services agencies.
name: 准备 detailed market study

description: Conducting both qualitative and quantitative studies to determine the fit between the newly developed products/services and the customers. 开展 external tests of the new product/service, and then refine them to maximize the customer uptake. Gather feedback from prospective customers and targeted populations by conducting surveys, focus groups, interviews, and detailed studies. Enlist professional services such as public relations or market research organizations.
name: 开展 customer tests and interviews

description: Finalizing the characteristics of new products/services by appropriately weighing feedback from prospective customers against a cost-benefit analysis in order to produce a profitable business proposition. Refine the attributes of the newly developed products/services, in light of the feedback and insights collected during 开展 customer tests and interviews [10094]. Revisit the high-level business case to justify the resources assigned to the product/service project against the anticipated benefits.
name: Finalize product/service characteristics and business cases

description: Reassessing the technical requirements in light of the final product/service attributes. Revisit the technical assessment to revalidate the organization's 容量 for progressing with new product/service projects, in light of the revised product/service characteristics.
name: Finalize technical requirements

description: Devising business plans and procedures for manufacturing/operations/production and delivery of services offered by the organization. Further in general terms the total amount of output that the manufacturing department is responsible to produce for each period.
name: 准备 for production/service delivery

description: Developing and/or sourcing the essential machinery needed for creating purpose-built processes, as well as the raw materials, to produce the new products/services. Either design the equipment and materials needed internally, or source from external vendors. Obtain the feedstock or raw materials needed to prepare the finished products, as well as the machinery - hardware and software - needed to arrange production lines, factory operations, assemblies, and manufacturing processes. Revisit the technologies that underpin the new or revised products/services in order to source the right equipment and materials.
name: 设计 and obtain necessary capabilities/materials and equipment

description: Identifying any 变更s that need to be effectuated in the organization's internal processes for manufacturing, and delivering the newly developed products/services. Determine if any 变更s need to be made to the production and distribution processes, in light of the new products/services. Begin production process planning. 准备 for factory layout planning. Generate shop-floor instructions and 变更s to the 供应链.
name: 识别 requirements for 变更s to manufacturing/delivery processes

description: Requesting 变更s in the production and/or delivery operations for processing the new or revised products/services. Rectify any 问题s identified in the manufacturing or delivery processes (through 监控 production runs [11417]). Seek 变更s in components, repair machinery, optimize production lines, and tweak factory assemblies through a formal notice to the concerned division, known as an engineering 变更 order.
name: Request engineering/process 变更

description: Finalizing production process or methodology. Install and initiate the production process to manufacture the new products, using the equipment and machinery already assembled. In the case of new services, implement delivery processes and methodologies. 验证 processes for the accuracy of their operation and proper functioning.
name: Install and validate production/service delivery process

description: Regularly 监控 production runs of the production and/or delivery operations.
name: 监控 initial production runs

description: Verifying the measures/processes/techniques through systems and tools involved in the introduction of 产品和服务.
name: 验证 launch procedures

description: Outlining process groups related to understanding markets, customers, and capabilities; developing marketing strategies; executing marketing plans; developing sales strategies; developing and managing marketing plans; and managing sales partners and alliances.
name: 营销和销售产品和服务

description: Making sense of the market and customers to identify the right opportunities to be capitalized, given the organization's competencies. Discern trends and shift in the market and customers. 识别 the right market opportunities that fit closely with the organization's capabilities and 战略 by gathering intelligence on various attributes of different market/customer segments.
name: Understand markets, customers, and capabilities

description: Gathering intelligence on the market and customers. Closely examine the inherent attributes and collective behavior of the various market and customer segments. 跟踪 trends in the market. Determine what drives the customers to make purchasing decisions in order to identify opportunities in the market.
name: Perform customer and market intelligence analysis

description: Carrying out research studies to understand the behavior of customers and the realities of the market. Undertake research to understand the market conditions as well as the characteristics, drives, and desires of prospective customers. Gather highly contextualized intelligence through primary and secondary research methods, with the objective of gaining insights over how to best seize a market opportunity. Consider assistance from professional research services.
name: 开展 customer and market research

description: Identifying the factors that drive the targeted market segment. 模型 customer purchasing patterns, and forecast their future purchasing behavior.
name: Understand consumer needs and historical behaviors

description: Using customer segmentation tools to examine past customer behavior to predict future purchasing patterns.
name: Predict customer purchasing behavior

description: Identifying a section of the customer population to target for marketing products/services. 创建 segments within the customer population for targeted marketing campaigns, which increase the efficacy of marketing outlay. Determine the right customer segments, craft effective marketing messages, and efficiently communicate them. Determine the optimal pricing mix. Consider assistance from professional services for market segmentation studies, with coordination and oversight from the marketing/sales functions.
name: 识别 market segments

description: Determining the increase or decrease of the company's sales volume in the targeted markets. 开展 an analysis to determine the factors and underlying causes that affect the 变更s in the demand for products or services offered. Consider 变更s in offerings or in the business 战略 to regain or increase the market share.
name: Determine market share gain/loss

description: Examining large-scale shifts and trends, with relevance to the organization's products/services. Vet the industrial and larger market landscape to identify broad-based movements that could have a direct or tangential impact on the uptake of the organization's products/services. Examine, among other things, the market capitalization of similar products, the profitability of organizations offering competing products/services, the stock price of key vendors/suppliers in the organizational value-chain, the rate and scale of 创新 activity in the organization's product/service category, the price and 可用性 of raw materials, and the shelf-life of similar products/services. 开展 primary and secondary research, and consider enlisting professional services.
name: 分析 market and industry trends

description: Examining the strengths and weaknesses of competing organizations. 评估 competing organizations for offerings, product 战略, marketing and delivery channels, etc. 分析 the usability experience, durability, USP, and other key attributes of competing and substitute products. Gather competitive intelligence, and consider enlisting professional services.
name: 分析 competing organizations, competitive/substitute products/services

description: Examining the brands owned and products offered in the market. Determine the relative position of the existing products/brands in the marketplace.
name: 评估 existing products/services

description: Understanding the culture and environment in which you're operating. 分析 how internal decision-making, thought processes, financial circumstances, and more affect the ability to bring new products to market. Survey or analyze the market into which the products would be introduced.
name: 评估 internal and external business environment

description: Appraising market opportunities by quantifying and subjecting them to prioritization, as well as validation tests. Closely examine the market opportunities that have been identified by Perform customer and market intelligence analysis [10106]. Triangulate those opportunities to capitalize by finding a fit between identified opportunities and the composite of organizational capabilities and business 战略.
name: 评估 and prioritize market opportunities

description: Attaching quantifiable indicators to opportunities that have been identified in the market. Compute estimated figures of the approximate value that can be captured with the provision of existing products/services (i.e., the extent of financial benefits that can be reaped in the market).
name: Quantify market opportunities

description: Identifying the targeted segment of customers. Deduce those particular customer segments that are to be targeted from among the market segments.
name: Determine target segments

description: Determining which groups of potential customers do not yet, or already do have access to the product or a service that the company produces or markets. Use those findings to create specialized product offerings and differentiated marketing campaigns.
name: 识别 under-served and saturated market segments

description: Creating an index of market opportunities, and arrange them in order of preference. 排定优先级 based on the opportunities' adherence to the overall business 战略. Correlate with the competencies and capacities that the organization, as a whole, processes.
name: 排定优先级 opportunities consistent with capabilities and overall business 战略

description: Confirming the practicability and reasonableness of the market opportunities that have been identified. Give substance to the real-time feasibility of the market opportunities.
name: 验证 opportunities

description: Validating identified market opportunities by testing company's offerings on limited-size samples of the consumer population that are hypothesized to be representative of the target market at large and to have similar purchasing behavior. The feedback gained through consumer testing can be used to modify or reject product offerings before their full scale launch, saving the company valuable resources, should the initial offering not be successful.
name: 测试 with customers/consumers

description: Verifying that the company has sufficient 基础设施 and resources to deliver their offerings in a timely and cost-effective manner, and that it is able to scale up from the small-scale market samples, used for consumer testing, to the entire identified market segment.
name: Confirm internal capabilities

description: AI-era activity: AI-Driven Customer Segmentation.
name: AI-Driven Customer Segmentation

description: Charting a strategic course for marketing products/services. This will include defining the value proposition, creating a mechanism for pricing, and determining the right mix of marketing channels. 创建 a specific positioning and branding for the organization's offerings. Enlist marketing head to lead, with inputs from the business development and sales functions.
name: 开发 marketing 战略

description: Refining the attributes of organizational offerings to define their value proposition for the customer. Clearly define the suite of offerings in terms of the value delivered, from the perspective of what the customer desires. 验证 the benefits delivered to the customers against target market segments, using techniques such as minimum viable product. Position brands for the respective products/services, in line with their unique value proposition and aligned with customers needs.
name: 定义 offering and customer value proposition

description: Defining 问题(s) that the organization's products/services solve for the customers, thereby determining how they are positioned in the market. Refine the product/service concepts from the perspective of customers. Succinctly outline the 问题 the organization's offerings solves for the customers, making a case for why the customer should buy a product or use a service. 定义 the offering's unique value.
name: 定义 offering and positioning

description: Boosting the attractiveness of products/services to the targeted customers, and creating a unique brand projection around these features. 识别 and enhance those product/service features that reinforce the attractiveness of these offerings, for these segment of customers. Underscore the perceived value delivered to the customers by clearly specifying the relevance and desirability of these products/services. Once it has been clarified how the organization's offerings meet the customer's expectations or deliver specific benefits, position the brands around these benefits.
name: 开发 value proposition including brand positioning for target segments

description: Validating the desirability of the perceived value delivered by the organization's offerings, to the targeted customer segment. Substantiate the value of the benefits accrued to the customers through the organization's offerings. Justify the value proposition in light of the targeted segments by gathering feedback (using teaser demonstrations, surveys, interviews, primary research studies, and customer case studies). Corroborate the benefits of the organization's offerings.
name: 验证 value proposition with target segments

description: Creating branding collaterals and campaigns that carve a significant and differentiated presence for the organization's offerings. 创建 new collaterals, which include names, designs, and symbols, for their products/services. Ensure collaterals reflect the unique value proposition of the respective offerings through a consistent theme. Create advertising and promotion campaigns.
name: 开发 new branding

description: Creating a pricing 战略 and mechanism that aligns with the benefits of the products/services, as perceived by customers. Chart a strategic course and a methodology that can guide the pricing of products/services. Draw heavily from the customer value proposition, and balance the expectations of different divisions inside the organization, while delivering the maximum ROI.
name: 定义 pricing 战略

description: Analyzing marketing objectives, consumer demand, product attributes, competitors' pricing, and economic trends to determine optimum prices for the set of 产品和服务 that the company offers or intends to offer by delivering maximum ROI.
name: 开展 pricing analysis

description: Creating a framework that allows for a uniform methodology while determining the price of individual offerings. Devise a blueprint for establishing the pricing of specific products/services. 创建 guidelines that factor in the cost of production/servicing, price sensitivity, product lifecycle, and the price of competing/substitute products.
name: 建立 guidelines for applying pricing and discounting of products/services

description: Determining optimum prices for individual products or services on the basis of the cost of producing, distributing and marketing the offerings, pricing analysis and general pricing 战略.
name: 建立 pricing targets

description: Confirming the 战略 and specifications developed for pricing the organization's products/services. Approve pricing guidelines by vetting the soundness of the methodology and the guidelines' 对齐 with the value proposition.
name: Approve pricing strategies/policies and targets

description: Establishing all the activities needed to identify the appropriate channels to market to different customer segments as defined in Determine target segments [10117]. This involves finding channel partners, ensuring that the channels align with organizational 战略 for each segment, and the final channel selection process.
name: 定义 and manage channel 战略

description: Deciding which distributors, wholesalers and retailers the company will use to promote its offerings and to distribute its 产品和服务 to the target market. Narrowing down which intermediaries the company will use will affect retail prices of individual products, and should therefore be included in the pricing analysis.
name: Determine channels to be supported

description: Identifying the role that each chosen marketing channels plays in the larger distribution network with respect to the organizational marketing 战略. Determine intermediary costs for shipping, handling, transporting, warehousing, insurance and marketing that incur and accumulate in the distribution channel.
name: 建立 channel objectives

description: 分析 the various channels for their relevance to the targeted segments. 识别 the channel that can effectively market to the targeted customers in regard to the drives, desires, and characteristics of these populations, their uptake, extent of engagement, frequency of use, and effectiveness in communicating.
name: Determine channel role and fit with target segments

description: Choose the most pertinent marketing channel for the targeted segments (based on Determine channel fit with target segments [10127]).
name: 选择 channels for target segments

description: Determining the maximum output rate required from a distribution channel to optimally market and deliver the 产品和服务 the company offers or would like to offer. Ideally, a channel should be able to adapt to a certain degree of variability in the demand for the offerings, and able scale up if needed.
name: 识别 required channel capabilities

description: Assessing the attributes of all marketing channels, and evaluating the key partners in those channels. Closely examine the various characteristics of all available marketing channels such as the cost of using them, durability of impact, applicability to the organization's products/services, turn-around time, involvement of middlemen, and conversion rate. 分析 key partners in the marketing channels including those who have been associated with the organization; evaluate their capabilities, the scale and scope of their operations, 质量 of support provided, etc.
name: 评估 channel attributes and potential partners

description: Coordinating marketing and distribution efforts across different channels that integrate well with each other, are in conformance with company values, visual identity and branding, and offer uniform 客户服务 experience that drives customer loyalty and repeat business.
name: Orchestrate seamless customer experience across supported channels

description: Devising a 战略 to market company's products or services seamlessly through all or most channels that are in widespread use among the target market. This may mean cross-channel access to customer preferences and purchasing history to accept returned merchandise, provide refunds, resolve payment issues or to provide technical support.
name: 定义 omni-channel 战略

description: Identifying necessary preconditions that a channel should fulfill in order to be included as one of the adopted channels, such as required throughput capacities, service capabilities, competitive pricing, and 对齐 with organizational marketing strategies.
name: 定义 omni-channel requirements

description: Determining the detailed policies and procedures that each of the channels needs to follow in order to conform to the organizational marketing 战略 and to provide seamless 客户服务 experience.
name: 开发 omni-channel policies and procedures

description: Determining the actions that need to be taken for successful multichannel marketing, the ordering, timing and dependencies of the steps, and the 治理 mechanism for reviewing and changing the protocol, if needed.
name: 开发 and manage execution roadmap

description: 监控 marketing and distribution efforts of all channels individually and as a network. Re-distribute or add resources to channels that perform better than expected. Purge or consolidate under-performing channels, and find more promising replacements.
name: 分析 and manage channel 绩效

description: Determining measurable parameters to be used for comparing the 绩效 of different marketing channels. Decide on benchmarks and values for optimum or desired 绩效.
name: 建立 channel-specific measures and targets

description: Tracking trends and 变更s in 绩效 inside individual marketing channels and in channels collectively. Summarize and document results. Alert relevant parties about significant or unexpected deviations from expected behaviors.
name: 监控 and report 绩效

description: Analyzing the factors and circumstances that influence desired outcomes. Communicate core findings to relevant parties.
name: 监控 and report events influencing factors

description: Conducting an analysis to review channel 绩效 with respect to chosen metrics, benchmarks and 绩效 targets [16573]. Compare to past 绩效 and forecasts for the channel.
name: 分析 channel 绩效

description: Devising a course of action to be taken to improve under-performing channels and to promote or expand channels that surpass expectations.
name: 开发 plan for channel improvements

description: Establishing marketing communications that deliver promotional messages, in a coordinated way, through multiple marketing channels, such as print, radio, television, direct mail, online or mobile advertising, email, social media or personal selling.
name: 开发 marketing communication 战略

description: Timing and scheduling the delivery of marketing messages to maximize their impact on customer purchasing behavior. Integrate individual messages to larger marketing campaigns and to seasonal purchasing patterns.
name: 开发 customer communication calendar

description: Deciding how to promote and maintain a favorable public image of the company in the eyes of its employees, customers, investors, suppliers, politicians or the general public. This may involve various means but is frequently conducted through publicity, education, corporate social responsibility, charitable causes or civic engagements.
name: 定义 public relations (PR) 战略

description: Devising a master plan how to select potential customers or qualified clients for customized offers, and contact them on one-to-one basis through chat, phone, email or regular mail. The 战略 would need to take into account that personalizing offers and contacting customers individually is an effective but resource-intensive marketing technique, and that ill-targeted offers 风险 at angering and alienating the contactees.
name: 定义 direct marketing 战略

description: Developing a program to promote the objectives, values, 产品和服务 of the company to its employees by treating them as potential customers, in order to extend company client base, increase employee engagement or to foster brand advocacy.
name: 定义 internal marketing communication 战略

description: Finding emerging media based on digital or other technologies that would enable the company to increase the speed and volume of marketing communications, to make communications more interactive and to customize promotional messages more easily to the target audience, thus rendering them more effective.
name: 识别 new media for marketing communication

description: Developing a marketing 战略 that is maximally effective in a new or emerging media channel by capitalizing on its novel attributes and capabilities.
name: 定义 new media communication 战略

description: Establishing a framework for coordinated marketing to increase the profitability and increase brand awareness at the point of sale. This may include promotional posters on product shelves or island displays, advertisements in shopping carts, stickers on the floor that lead consumers to the promoted product, multi-buy promotions, coupons on sales receipts, etc.
name: 定义 point of sale (POS) communication 战略

description: Establishing standardized procedures for effective communication that maximizes ROI, promotes brand awareness and respects customers. In its simplest form, it includes a message (what is to be said), a target (to whom the message is reaching) and a medium or a channel (where the message is to be said).
name: 定义 communication guidelines and mechanisms

description: Creating and managing a customer loyalty program. The loyalty program is a key part of marketing, with an elaborate 战略 and process for acquiring, retaining, and engaging with members. Members are engaged and acquainted to the loyalty program, thus growing relationship and adding value through the program.
name: 设计 and manage customer loyalty program

description: Devising procedures and mechanisms to retain existing customers, promote repeat business and increase the likelihood that previous customers to continue to buy products or services from the company. This may be achieved by rewarding customers for repeat business by means of gifts, discounts, redeemable "points", or prioritized access to new products, events or services.
name: 定义 customer loyalty program

description: Convincing customers to register their personal information with the company and be assigned a unique identifier that they use when making purchases. The identifier makes it easier for the company to track customer purchases. Customers are rewarded by various incentives that encourage repeat business [20007].
name: Acquire members to customer loyalty program

description: Building deeper relationships between a customer and a brand in order to promote customer loyalty and derive repeat business. Besides making frequent purchases, highly engaged customers refer family, friends and colleagues to make purchases as well, consume and re-broadcast promotional materials, provide feedback to the purchases they make and do not support competing brands.
name: 构建 engagement and relationship with members

description: Surveying and tracking the benefits of customer loyalty programs both for the company and for customers. Compare with comparable loyalty programs instituted in competitor companies. Propose 变更s as needed to keep up with market trends.
name: 监控 customer loyalty program benefits to the enterprise and the customer

description: Enhancing the customer loyalty program so that it will yield maximum value both for the company and for the patrons enrolled in the program, increasing customer retention and continued engagement.
name: 优化 loyalty program value to both the enterprise and the customer

description: Creating specific plans to market offerings to customers. This process group includes processes for making budgets, identifying and developing media, pricing 产品和服务, managing packaging, managing marketing content and promotional activities, tracking and responding to customer insight and 监控 measures established within "develop marketing 战略". Additionally, in this process group, organizations take action on plans made in earlier processes. Here, marketing and customers are managed and measured along with any supporting materials.
name: 开发 and manage marketing plans

description: Determining what to achieve by marketing. 创建 qualitative and quantitative targets. 建立 metrics to track 绩效 (for individual Market segments [10109] and Channels for target segments [10129]). Enlist the head of marketing to determine marketing priorities and the related measures. (The decision in establishing these goals, objectives, and metrics is founded in 开发 marketing 战略 [10102] and takes cues from current priorities and organizational 战略.)
name: 建立 goals, objectives, and measures for products/services by channel/segment

description: Creating a budget for the organization's marketing efforts, in line with the business-wide strategic outlook. 创建 a plan to distribute resources for achieving the marketing 战略 in light of the overall business 战略. Make cost assumptions; calculate the estimated total revenue from the marketing activities against the costs/expenses of these activities. 预测 the return on investment. Attribute costs to the appropriate marketing activities such as promotional campaigns, advertising, marketing communications, PR campaigns, personnel, and office space. Enlist the financial and marketing functions.
name: 建立 marketing budgets

description: Ensuring corroboration of the marketing 战略 and the organizational 战略. Ensure the organization's marketing 战略/plan aligns with the overall business 战略. Fine-tune the marketing plan according to the organizational 战略.
name: Confirm marketing 对齐 to business 战略

description: Calculating the total cost of marketing the organization's portfolio of products/services. Calculate the total outlay needed for promoting, selling, and delivering the organization's products/services to customers. Account for all costs to acquire customers and sustain a relationship with them. Include the expenses needed for promotional actives, warehousing, transactional costs, and distribution of the organization's offering.
name: Determine costs of marketing

description: Estimating the outlay required for promoting, selling, and distributing the products/services of the organization. Add up the expenses of all activities necessitated in marketing, such as promotional campaigns, advertising, marketing communications, PR campaigns, employing skilled personnel, and office space.
name: 创建 marketing budget

description: Estimating how much profit the company would generate for its expenses on marketing . Forecasted return on investment, used as a metric to gauge the efficiency of marketing, is beneficial in revising marketing budgets and adjusting costs to improve the overall yield.
name: Determine projected ROI for marketing investment

description: Determining and maintaining a pricing mechanism based on forecasted sales and that enables a pricing equilibrium for the lifecycles of products/services. 创建 a pricing mechanism, factoring in attributes relating to the market, customers, sales, and the cost of production. 实施 this pricing mechanism over all products/services. 分析 its 绩效, and adjust accordingly.
name: 开发 and manage pricing

description: Determining the production and distribution costs for each product or service, and each channel or method as factors in determining overall pricing.
name: Understand resource requirements for each product/service and delivery channel/method

description: Introducing financial inducements, such as discounts, to distributors, resellers or vendors as a motivation to prioritize selling company's products or services over those of its competitors.
name: Determine corporate incentives

description: Establishing a dynamic pricing mechanism for the organization's offerings that is supported by the number of units in production. Outline a system for determining the optimum price point for each product/service. Based this 模型 on an estimation of the volume of anticipated sales for each offering and variable costs.
name: Determine pricing based on volume/unit forecast

description: Implementing the pricing mechanism to determine prices for all individual offerings in the organizational portfolio. Calculate the prices of all offerings based on the established methodology and/or formulaic structure.
name: 执行 pricing plan

description: Examining the efficiency of pricing with the objective of identifying any divergence from the equilibrium prices and avoiding any deadweight loss. Gauge the 绩效 of the pricing plan by tracking growth in the revenue and/or customer uptake, secured as a result of new prices. Measure the 绩效 of pricing by periodically checking the profits generated from the sale of each of the organization's offerings against the backdrop of any events that may have influenced the uptake of a certain good/service by the customer base.
name: 评估 pricing 绩效

description: Refining the pricing mechanism to create equitable prices for all products/services with the objective of maximizing the profits and/or customer uptake of these offerings. Reconcile the pricing mechanism in order to achieve equilibrium pricing. Adjust the prices for all of the organization's offerings, using the insights gleaned from examining how much profit or customer uptake is generated by the present pricing 战略.
name: Refine pricing as needed

description: Managing schemes that offer lower pricing for a limited time as a promotional and sales incentive when launching a new product or a service.
name: 实施 promotional pricing programs

description: Determining the optimum consumer pricing for each product or service at the point of sale, based on production and distribution costs and estimated sales volume.
name: 实施 other retail pricing programs

description: Assigning new prices or pricing adjustments to products or services to replace the original base prices. Update the prices in product catalogs and databases, and disseminate the information through all involved distribution and marketing channels.
name: Communicate and implement price 变更s

description: Obtaining internal price approvals and governmental approvals that are required for licensed products and for products that can be reimbursed by the government.
name: Achieve regulatory approval for pricing

description: Conceptualizing, testing, and executing product/service/brand promotions. Once a promotion has launched, this process continues as the organization tweaks parts of the promotion or chooses to use ideas or lessons learned during the promotion in future activities. The promotion's 绩效 according to organizational measures is also evaluated in this process. Determine early on whether you need third party help with promotion. Purchase lists, consult with social media experts, hire seasonal staff, or pay for additional research.
name: 开发 and manage promotional activities

description: Outlining a conceptual framework for all promotional activity in order to create an overarching aspiration and ensure consistency. 创建 a plan for running promotional programs and designing the associated activities in order to increase visibility or sales. Determine how the organization quantifies what it wishes to achieve from these activities, what sort of messages the organization comfortable publicizing, what channels the organization wishes to employ, etc.
name: 定义 promotional concepts and objectives

description: Developing the central messages for a segment of its customers. Craft concise statements that position the value proposition of individual products/services around the pressing concerns in the market, thereby showing how the organization's offerings are the right fit for the customers.
name: 开发 marketing messages

description: Determining the appropriate audience to direct marketing efforts at. 识别 the particular group of customers to target. Discover the appropriate customer groups at a micro-level. Use techniques such as segmentation analysis, whereby the entire population is sliced according to certain demographic or behavioral attributes.
name: 定义 target audience

description: Developing a scheme for executing the promotional programs and campaigns, and testing these on sample audiences. 创建 a program plan, and carry out trials for promotional activities. 开发 a scheme for how, when, where, and by whom the promotional schemes and campaigns will be deployed. 设计 incentives that convince or tempt the consumer to take up the organization's offerings. 开展 focus groups and pilot programs that reach out to a smaller number of people from among the target audiences to validate effectiveness.
name: 规划 and test promotional activities

description: Executing promotional programs in the market for reaching out to the desired customer segments. 实施 the promotional schemes and campaigns. 创建 collaterals for the dissemination of information about the product, product line, brand, or company to the target audiences in an effective manner. Leverage relationships with distributors, vendors, and retailers. Consider enlisting professional services such as design, PR, and advertising firms.
name: 执行 promotional activities

description: Evaluating the success of promotional programs through metrics that track the impact of these activities. Examine the 绩效 of promotional activities. Measure the success of these programs through metrics representative of customer uptake, market penetration, sustenance of impact created, revenue growth through offerings marketed, etc. Measure through primary data collection. 分析 through various statistical techniques to generate insights.
name: 评估 promotional 绩效 metrics

description: Fine-tuning promotional activities by employing the insights gleaned from the quantitative, as well as any qualitative, 绩效 evaluations. 变更 certain attributes of the schemes, campaigns, and programs deployed in order to increase the impact generated, in terms of measures already agreed upon such as customer uptake, market penetration, sustenance of impact created, and revenue growth through offerings marketed.
name: Refine promotional 绩效 metrics

description: Incorporating the understanding developed by studying promotional activities as well as refining them. Include the best practices and value-enhancing attributes identified in Refine promotional activities [10171] into similarly planned schemes, programs, and campaigns. Adjust promotional activities to further increase the effectiveness of the overall promotional efforts.
name: Incorporate learning into future/planned consumer promotions

description: Collating all customer-centered metrics. The objective is to create a big-picture view of the customers' mindset and their behavior pertaining to the organization's offerings.
name: 跟踪 customer management measures

description: Estimating customer loyalty and the average contribution made by them to revenues, over their lifespan. Use metrics to quantify the commitment of customers to the offerings of the organization, such as measures of tendency to switch brands/providers, number/proportion of return customers, and the number of customers using multiple substitutable offerings.
name: Determine customer lifetime value

description: Analyzing the revenue stream generated by the sale of the organization's products/services in order to identify trends therein. Examine data relating to the inflow of revenue from individual/groups of customers in order to identify patterns in the generation and sustenance of receivables. 开展 statistical analysis over the stream of revenue collected and the point of origin associated with each unit of sale through metrics such as the accounting rate of return, the GAAP revenue over a given period, and customer lifetime revenue.
name: 分析 customer revenue trend

description: Calculating measures that capture the proportion of customers the organization is able to retain to those it is losing. Compute metrics such as the tendency to switch brands/providers and the proportion of return customers to comprehend the trends within the customer attrition and retention rates.
name: 分析 customer attrition and retention rates

description: Studying all measures of the customer's behavior and conduct toward the organization's offerings in order to glean insight and identify patterns into their decision making. Closely examine all categories of data sets over a customer base. 分析 data points related to customer loyalty, retention, value, conversion, level of satisfaction, attrition, etc. Flesh out measures for an all-encompassing analysis that provides a macro-level picture of the customer's behavior and mindset related to the organization's products/services.
name: 分析 customer metrics

description: Reviewing and reappraising the strategies, objectives, and plans for all customer-centered processes. Revisit all customer-focused processes and activities--which relate to their acquisition, conversion, and retention--with the objective of revising them in light of customer analysis. Revise accordingly.
name: Revise customer strategies, objectives, and plans based on metrics

description: Reviewing and responding to customer feedback. 创建 tickets to initiate bug fixes or to propose feature updates. 监控 and track progress.
name: 分析 and respond to customer insight

description: Following postings on social media to promote offerings, raise brand awareness, interact with customers, increase customer engagement and brand loyalty, respond to queries, gauge sentiment regarding company's products or services, and to derive customer insight.
name: 监控 and respond to social media activity

Various metrics can be used to measure user activity, such as number of users who are new, returning or unique, time spent on page, session duration, bounce rate, click through rate, conversion rate, and others.

description: Creating, executing, and administering a strategic road map for packaging products/services. Determine how to package products/services into finished offerings that can be directly marketed to prospective customers. Consider physicality, perishability, and shelf-life. 开发 a 战略 for packaging products/services. 测试 alternatives. 收集 feedback. Refine the option chosen for execution. Have marketing, product development, and 供应链 functions work together to develop sound packaging.

description: Implementing the final packaging. Put into action the packaging 战略 in light of the insights accumulated from testing various options.

description: Fine-tuning the packaging that has been developed and tested using insights gleaned from feedback.

description: Creation of a plan detailing how a company plans to execute a successful product 发布 and promotion, and ultimately its sale to customers.

description: AI-era activity: AI-Powered Pricing Optimization.

description: Gathering all information about sales orders into an index. 创建 a directory of all sales orders, whether open or those which have been fulfilled. 跟踪 what product/service was ordered, the quantity ordered, who ordered it, the delivery date, the shipping method, the unit price and line total, payment terms, and any discount applied.
name: Gather current and historic order information

description: Analyzing sales order data to identify patterns in order to capitalize on emerging trends in the industry or the economy. Closely examine the directory of sales orders. Glean patterns from this analysis, including the triangulation of segments that are showing the most growth in demand or those that represent the highest decline revenue, industry-wide trends such as decline/boost in overall demand, and any unusual trends that lie outside of the organization's expectations.

description: Setting targets for organizational achievement. description: Determining the percentage of total sales volume in the market for a particular product.

Based on this review, establish sales targets along with metrics to quantify these goals, corresponding with the overall business 战略.

description: Identifying the appropriate measures that can represent key attributes of the customer management function. 选择 measures to track customer activity, feedback, satisfaction, organizational responsiveness to customer needs, and general data on how the organization is managing customer accounts, leads, and contacts. 构建 on customer and market intelligence to identify metrics gauging aspects related to customer management. Select measures based on the nature of the business, the type and size of customer base, strategic goals, and the 模型 used to structure sales and customer relationships.

description: Selling products/services. Set appropriate customer expectations. Work with customers using the same schedule that product/service development, production, and 客户服务 functions follow. 管理 sales personnel and sales partnerships/alliances.

description: Generating leads of prospective customers to grow the organization's business. 识别 viable customers based on customer and market research. Employ a scoring 模型 qualify the prospective customers into leads, and prioritize them.

description: Identifying people who can be converted into customers. Leverage personal and professional networks, business research over databases and directories, and secondary research.

description: Aligning sales leads with business objectives.

description: Creating plans about how to close leads and win sales opportunities.

description: Planning the distribution of personnel across various sales functions. Match the capabilities of individual employees with the skill sets needed for specific roles. Seek assistance from HR.

Devise a recipe for handling the organization's key customers in order to manage their expectations with tact and responsibility while maximizing revenue.

description: Choosing principal clients that are vital for the company.

description: Handling the accounts of important clients.

When compiling the response, they must take into consideration whether the requirements are a match with the strategic or tactical plans of the organization and whether they are able to submit a bid/proposal that is competitive based on an understanding of the offerings of other competing organizations. The next step will be to define the pricing and scheduling of the proposed solution and determine whether the proposal will be profitable for the company if accepted. The bid is then submitted and a notification of whether or not it was successful is received.

description: Comparing the proposals submitted by different bidders in terms of cost, efficiency and value.

description: Assessing the business 战略, forecasted 绩效, financing and cash flow of the proposals.

description: Deepening knowledge about the customer's field of operation and business needs.

description: Handling proposals depending on whether they were accepted or rejected.

description: Taking, receiving, processing, and acknowledging new customer orders or amendments to outstanding customer orders. 监控 status from order receipt to customer delivery/customer invoicing.

description: Receiving and confirming orders from customers. 验证 that no extra expenses have to be disbursed on part of the organization for labor or inventory when processing the order.

description: Collecting and maintaining all account information. 收集 information about the purchase, servicing, return, and/or commitment of any products/services on part of the organization to its customers. Bring together information from various organizational divisions, and update periodically.

description: Managing essential information of customer accounts.

description: Imparting guidance and instruction to sales partners/alliances concerning products/services. Distribute literature about the organization's products/services. 开展 workshops. Disseminate useful media content to engage and enlighten partners. 创建 communities through group engagements.

description: 提供 训练 and certification to develop strategies for marketing-driven sales.

description: Reviewing, processing and issuing certifications and accrediting skills and competencies.

description: Backing sales partners and strategic alliances.

description: Distributing marketing materials and sales brochures to entities that the company partners with.

description: Examining the 绩效 of its partners/alliances in selling its products/services. Use metrics such as growth in revenue generated, conversion rate, and total outreach to customers for assessing the 绩效 results.

description: Managing the repository of data relating to the organization's partners/alliances over time. Store, maintain, access, revise, and use all data on partners/alliances. 管理 data. Ensure its 安全. Determine legitimate use cases that are beneficial to the organization.

description: Execution of sales at physical / brick and mortar locations.

description: Creating strategies for production and materials. Handle the demand for the products of the organization. 开发 plans for handling materials. Develop and administer the schedule for master production. 规划 for distribution requirements and its constraints by reviewing and assessing distribution policies and 绩效 and by establishing 质量 standards and procedures.

description: Defining limitations in the ability of the organization's 供应链 to deliver a new stock, and creating a network of production stakeholders. Frame and manage relationships within the flow of manufacturing and processing operations. 识别 probable supply issues.

This may include step-by-step instructions to help workers carry out complex routine operations. description: Forecasting demand for products using secondary research and customer feedback. Refine these forecasts. Inspect the approach used in creating forecasts, and determine its accuracy.

description: 识别 the bedrock levels of market demand anticipated for the organization's products/services. Estimate future demand for product and services using historical data, analysis of the market environment and any externalities, etc. to create ex ante approximations.

description: Working closely with the organization's customers to understand their drives and behavior, with the objective of estimating future demand. Reach out to customers through various means to understand their behavior patterns, usage elasticity, and degree of variability--and ultimately determine demand for each offering.

description: Arriving at a consensus over the forecasted levels of demand for products/services. Consensus is achieved by juxtaposing decisions developed in the baseline forecast with those reached at by collaborating with customers. Enlist senior-level decision makers of the sales and marketing functions.

description: 识别 the volume of products/services that may be committed for delivery to fulfill sales. Figure out the amount of stock available. 预测 its volumes.

description: Picking out any activity that deviates from the forecast, and adjusting it. Closely track and study the levels of demand as they emerge. Refine the consensus forecast as needed.

description: Examining the methodology used to estimate future demand. Refine it in light of current market realities and demand.

Start with an unconstrained plan, and refine based on 供应链 realities by identifying critical materials required for production, checking material specifications, and collaborating with all vendors over the supply.
name: 创建 materials plan

description: Developing a plan for raw materials and other inventory items in order to meet market demand. Ensure the 可用性 of all inventory items such as raw materials and spares. 创建 a blueprint in line with 定义 labor and materials policies [10230].

description: Collaborating with vendors and contractual manufacturers with the objective of ensuring a continual supply of raw materials and spares. Leverage long-term connections/relationships with various suppliers, and cultivate new ones. 跟踪 the activities of all vendors. 接收 regular updates to prepare for any fluctuations in supply.

Determine the essential and crucial inventory items required for the smooth functioning of all manufacturing processes. description: Generating a bounded plan that takes stock of the actual 供应链 scenario. Take stock of all information collected while creating an inventory supply plan.

description: 创建 representative logical system that provides the framework to attain strategic objectives based on resources, product volumes, and processes. Provides the general sequential flow and 容量 requirement relationships among raw materials, parts, resources, finished products, and product families.

description: Creating  the plan for internal activities such as production, inventory, and staffing. Include forecasted quantity of items to produce based on inputs from sales planning, demand planning/forecasting, and 供应链 partners.

description: Supervising and overseeing the plan for internal activities such as production, inventory, and staffing. Set the quantity of items to produce each week of a short-range planning horizon.

description: Maintaining master data of finished products and inventory. 识别 the requirements of finished products at the destination, as well as partner requirements. Calculate the consolidation at source. 管理 replenishment planning. 创建 and administer a dispatch plan. Calculate load plans for destinations and partners. Manage the cost of supplying these products. Ensure effective utilization of 容量.

description: Maintaining and preserving the master data plan for distribution requirements. 创建 a systematic collection of facts and figures regarding the distribution of the inventories. 维护 policies, processes, and tools covering the distribution function.

description: Interact with the concerned person at the destination to validate the requirements and to avoid any miscommunication of information.

description: 评估 constraints, needs, parameters, and conditions for physical storage and retrieval of components or products for future use or shipment in a storage facility within a certain timeframe.

description: Offering services to customers. This is the act of providing service delivery as a core business practice and covers identifying strategies for performing service delivery, managing resources, and delivering services to the customer.

description: Creating rules and regulations for service delivery to the customer. 建立 a system to manage 绩效, delivery, and direction of service delivery. Engage with the customer for satisfaction feedback. 定义 goals, policies, processes, and workplace layout and 基础设施 as a part of the service delivery 战略.
name: 建立 service delivery 治理 and strategies

description: Establishing service delivery 治理 through a system that manages 绩效, development, and direction. Allow for customer feedback on delivery satisfaction.
name: 建立 service delivery 治理

description: Providing a system for which to manage customer needs and a structure for which to facilitate service delivery to fulfill those needs.
name: Set up and maintain service delivery 治理 and management system

description: Conducting and implementing 绩效 measures to ensure successful delivery of service to the customer.
name: 管理 service delivery 绩效

description: Providing guidance of resources to ensure that the development and direction of service delivery is in line with customer needs.
name: 管理 service delivery development and direction

description: Engaging the customer post delivery to gauge the effectiveness of services rendered in order to improve on key delivery functions going forward.
name: Solicit feedback from customer on service delivery satisfaction

description: Constructing strategies that identify goals, policies, processes, and procedures in relation to service delivery. 审查 and validate strategies. 定义 the workplace layout and 基础设施.
name: 开发 service delivery strategies

description: Aligning organization practices to meet the needs of the customer by creating service delivery goals.
name: 定义 service delivery goals

description: Outlining labor policies for resources and ensuring that those policies meet the needs of the organization, the customer, and government regulations.
name: 定义 labor policies

description: Understanding the needs of the customer and providing the necessary resources to meet those requirements.
name: 评估 resource 可用性

description: Identifying and understanding the limitations imposed upon service delivery network and supply.
name: 定义 service delivery network and supply constraints

description: Defanging policies and procedures that focus on meeting the needs and expectations of the customer within the working parameters of the organization.
name: 定义 service delivery process

description: Revisioning service delivery procedures that fall short of 绩效 parameters. Realign procedures with specified expectations in order to provide successful service delivery.
name: 审查 and validate service delivery procedures

description: Creating a workplace that best serves the needs of the organization and customer through strategic layout and 基础设施.
name: 定义 service delivery workplace layout and 基础设施

description: Understanding the demands on resources and creating a plan to enable the delivery of services via those resources.
name: 管理 service delivery resources

description: Ensuring necessary resources are maintained through 监控 流水线, developing forecasts, and collaborating with customers. Determine skills needed for service deliver and forecast customer orders. 监控 forecasted orders and modify if where needed. Measure forecast accuracy.
name: 管理 service delivery resource demand

description: Tracking potential opportunities as they move through the various stages of the 流水线.
name: 监控 流水线

description: Identifying the demand anticipated for the organization's services. Estimate future demand for services using historical data, analysis of the market environment, and external data.
name: 开发 baseline forecasts

description: Providing a collaborative meeting in which to engage the customer to understand the scope of their needs and constructing solutions based on need and constraints.
name: Collaborate with customers

description: Arriving at a consensus over the forecasted levels of demand for services by analyzing baseline forecasts and customer input.
name: 开发 consensus forecast

description: Identifying what skillset is necessary for the delivery of opportunities. Determine the forecast of customer orders based upon those skillsets and the resources available.
name: Determine 可用性 of skills to deliver on current and forecast customer orders

description: Overseeing all activities necessary to deliver services to customer. Revise forecast to account for any issues that may arise. This could be 变更s in market trend, resource 变更s, etc.
name: 监控 activity against forecast and revise forecast

description: Recognizing potential 问题s in the current forecast and making the necessary 变更s to align the forecast meet demand.
name: 评估 and revise forecasting approach

description: Analyzing forecasting against actuals to determine accuracy. Modify forecasting to align with actual need.
name: Measure forecast accuracy

description: Identifying the need for and creating a resource plan. Understand resource demand and align with 容量, skills, and capabilities. Enlist suppliers and partners to supplement needed skills and capabilities. 监控 and manage capabilities and skills with an eye on critical resources and supplier 容量.
name: 创建 and manage resource plan

description: Analyzing the skills needed to perform services to be delivered. Classify and organize these skills requirements.
name: 定义 and manage skills taxonomy

description: Creating a plan to ensure that all resources are available to carry out services required for the customer. This can include physical resources and personnel.
name: 创建 resource plan

description: Matching demand with skills and capability. Enlisting suppliers and partners to help with demand when needed.
name: Match resource demand with 容量, skills, and capabilities

description: Understanding organizational need to enlist suppliers to provide resources for gaps in skills and capabilities. 识别 where additional skills are needed and collaborate with third parties to fill those demands.
name: Collaborate with suppliers and partners to supplement skills and capabilities

description: Realizing critical resources required to perform and carry out customer needs. Engage with suppliers to fulfill those needs, if necessary. 识别 supplier threshold for performing those needs.
name: 识别 critical resources and supplier 容量

description: Directing and managing workforce needs. Ensure that resources are at full 容量. 监控 that all resources are able to skilled in their respective rolls. Make sure that necessary resources are available to provide the needed services.
name: 监控 and manage resource 容量 and 可用性

description: Instituting 训练 to enable resources to provide service delivery to the customer. 开发 a 训练 plan. 创建 materials that provide for operation and technical 训练. 调度, perform, and evaluate 训练.
name: Enable service delivery resources

description: Creating a detailed summary of all the actions relevant to teaching a person a particular skill or type of behavior. Determine who will deliver the 训练. Determine when and where the apprentice or trainee needs to go to receive the structured component of the 训练.
name: 开发 service delivery 训练 plan

description: Developing materials necessary to provide comprehensive 训练 for the skills or behavior needed to deliver services. This can be any number for formats such as classroom or computer based 训练.
name: 开发 训练 materials

description: Providing 训练 to the employee within a manageable timeframe to meet the needs of both the individual and the organization.
name: 管理 训练 schedule

description: Educating service delivery personnel on all aspects of the operations process of the organization.
name: Deliver operations 训练

description: Ensuring that all personnel are trained on all technical aspects of service delivery.
name: Deliver technical 训练

description: Verifying that 训练 provided to the person was successful through the administration testing and the application of skills for practical use.
name: Perform skill and capability testing

description: Eliciting feedback from various sources to evaluate the 训练 provided. This can be achieved through testing and the practical application of skills. Additionally, manager or student feedback can be garnered to evaluate 训练 effectiveness.
name: 评估 训练 effectiveness

description: Rendering service to the customer by initiating, executing, and completing tasks associated with service delivery.
name: Deliver service to customer

description: Collaborating with the customer to understand service needs. 审查, understand, and modify the delivery scope with the organization needs of the customer in mind. Confirm readiness and identify, select, and assign resources. 规划 for service delivery.
name: Initiate service delivery

description: Meeting with the customer, partner, and/or supplier to review the terms of the solutions contract and agree on the terms set forth.
name: 审查 contract and agreed terms

description: Taking the customer requirements for a solution and applying those requirements to a refined approach for service.
name: Understand customer requirements and define refine approach

description: Updating the project plan to align with the new solution approach agreed upon with the customer.
name: Modify/revise and approve project plan

description: Aligning the customer business objectives with the agreed service delivery solution.
name: 审查 customer business objectives

description: Confirming that the organization has the recourses necessary to meet the expectations for the solution for service delivery.
name: Confirm environmental readiness

description: Identifying, selecting, and assigning resources required to deliver service to the customer. Ensure that all objectives are established and met, and the all rules of engagement have been identified and communicated.
name: 识别, select, and assign resources

description: Providing the workforce with a plan of action and goals necessary to provide a service. Make sure that those objectives are met.
name: 建立 people objectives

description: Establishing guidelines for how resources engage with the customer. For example, set rules of accountability, interaction, and accommodation when engaging the customer. Resources should be polite, empathetic, and attentive.
name: 建立 engagement rules

description: Establishing a plan of action to successfully render a solution for service delivery.
name: 规划 for service delivery

description: Carrying out service delivery to the customer by creating and deploying the necessary solution. 分析 need and create a solution. 验证 the solution and make 变更s if needed. Obtain approval to build/buy solution and then deploy solution to customer.
name: 执行 service delivery

description: Understanding the needs of the customer and providing the necessary resources to meet those requirements within the scope of the organization.
name: 分析 environment and customer needs

description: Creating a plan of action to provide service delivery to the customer through a possible solution. This solution should be in response to a collaborative effort made by the organization and the customer to meet service delivery needs.
name: 定义 solution

description: Validating that the proposed solution is feasible and provides the needed services for the customer.
name: 验证 solution

description: Realizing issues within the original drafted solution and providing 变更s to correct those issues.
name: 识别 变更s

description: Gaining approval from all avenues to proceed with providing solutions for service delivery.
name: Obtain approval to proceed

description: Constructing or purchasing solutions necessary to provide service delivery.
name: Make build/buy solution

description: Providing the customer with promised services and solutions.
name: 部署 solution

description: Implementing final steps to complete service delivery to the customer. 评估 success through project review, complete finance activities, and confirm delivery. 发布 resources and manage completion by harvesting knowledge and systems by archiving records.
name: Complete service delivery

description: Reviewing the entire service delivery process to evaluate the success of the project from beginning to end.
name: 开展 service delivery/project review and evaluate success

description: Insuring all payments are received and all activates therein are completed.
name: Complete/finalize financial management activities

description: Confirming that the organization has satisfied all terms of the delivery contract set forth in collaboration between the organization and customer.
name: Confirm delivery according to contract terms

description: Discharging leveraged resources from service delivery commitments upon completion. Returning resources to the resource pool.
name: 发布 resources

description: Ensuring that all aspects of the service delivery process are completed both internally and externally.
name: 管理 service delivery completion

description: Garnering feedback from all avenues to collect a knowledge base concerning services rendered.
name: Harvest knowledge

description: Completing and archiving all records associated with requested services. Update all necessary systems to reflect those 变更s.
name: Archive records and update systems
