description: Managing customers before and after the delivery of services. This includes developing and planning 客户服务 practices with an eye on steering processes relating to inquiries after sales, feedback, warranties, and recalls.
name: 管理客户服务

description: Defining a plan that removes customer obstacles by gathering operational insight and competitive insight, as well as improving soft skills and forward resolution for employees. 开发 customer segmentation. 定义 rules and regulations for 客户服务. 建立 服务水平s for customers.
name: 开发 客户服务 战略

description: Defining a set of behaviors, skills, and policies needed to provide 客户服务 effectively across the enterprise.
name: 定义 客户服务 requirements across the enterprise

description: Communicating to the 客户服务 resources what is expected when engaging the customer. Relate 服务水平 expectations to the workforce. Ensure positive customer experience.
name: 定义 客户服务 experience

description: Establishing and refining procedures for 客户服务 and technical support.
name: 定义 and manage 客户服务 channel 战略

description: Outlining the framework of policies and methods for developing 客户服务 战略. 建立 the rules and regulations that serve as a guideline for the 客户服务 战略. Take into account customer needs and behavior.
name: 定义 客户服务 policies and procedures

description: Determining and implementing levels for 客户服务s. Benchmark certain 客户服务 practices, and base customer level services on those benchmarks. 创建 a 服务水平 agreement, which is a negotiated agreement designed to create a common understanding about services, priorities, and responsibilities.
name: 建立 target 服务水平 for each customer segment

description: Determining the exact terms and conditions under which specific warranties apply to certain goods or services.
name: 定义 warranty claims

description: Establishing warranty policies to assure customers that the company will guarantee its warranties that it issues.
name: Determine and document warranty policies

description: Establishing and maintaining claims processing and routing rules. 建立 and maintain claims processing and routing rules for product warranties, coverage lists, repair, fault, trouble codes, repair time setup, and warranty policy registration. This also includes rolling out the codes and rules, and the improvements/updates to these rules and codes via systematic updates.
name: 创建 and manage warranty rules/claim codes for products

description: Negotiating with manufacturers and dealers the obligations of each party in upholding warranties.
name: Agree on warranty responsibilities with suppliers

description: Informing customers about warranties that apply to promoted products or services.
name: 定义 warranty related offerings for customers

description: Communicating rules and updates via 训练 manuals for new products and 训练 resources.
name: Communicate warranty policies and offerings

description: Establishing procedures to handle recalls of defective products.
name: 开发 recall 战略

description: AI-era activity: Intelligent Chatbot Management.
name: Intelligent Chatbot Management

description: Planning and administering work force operations for 客户服务 provision by taking care of 客户服务s requests/inquiries, as well as the complaints.
name: 规划 and manage 客户服务 contacts

description: Creating and administering the work force deployed for the 客户服务 process. 预测 the customer work force needs to correctly schedule the work force. 跟踪 the utility of the work force deployed. Examine the interactions between the customer and 客户服务 representatives to achieve high 质量.
name: 规划 and manage 客户服务 work force

description: Projecting the total work force required to service 客户服务 inquiries in order to effectively predict the volume of vendor contracts required. Estimate the number of the 客户服务 contracts in an agreed-upon time frame in order to strategically maintain the work force necessitated for customer inquires. 分析 historical data around 客户服务 contracts, the universe of customer inquiries, frequency of inquiries, servicing capability (per head) of the employees, etc.
name: 预测 volume of 客户服务 contacts

description: Deploying the work force to manage 客户服务 contracts. 创建 a systematic summary of the operations and service required, as well as the specific amount of work force that is to be deployed to the 客户服务 operations. Ensure work force is directly proportional to the estimated forecast of 客户服务 contracts.
name: 调度 客户服务 work force

description: Tracking the utilization of work force deployed for managing 客户服务 operations. 监控 the utility of the work force deployed for managing 客户服务 operations in order to evaluate its efficiency and cost effectiveness. Calculate the overall labor effectiveness, which measures the utility, 绩效, and 质量 of the work force.
name: 跟踪 work force utilization

description: Tracking and determining the 质量 of interactions between the customer and customer representatives. Use electronic devices to record and effectively assess customer representatives' interactions.
name: 监控 and evaluate 质量 of customer interactions with 客户服务 representatives

description: Handling the requests and inquiries from customers that seek information regarding the organization's products/services. Obtain the customer requests online and by phone. Direct these requests to higher-level representatives. Approve requests, and respond to customers.
name: 管理 客户服务 问题s, requests, and inquiries

description: Receiving requests for information from customers over multiple channels. 接收 various requests and inquiries from customers regarding products/services. Accept these inquiries through channels such as email, telephone, online forms, text messages, social media, and in person. Supply dedicated equipment, systems, and personnel.
name: 接收 customer 问题s, requests, and inquiries

description: Analyzing various requests and inquiries from customers regarding products/services. 提供 answers and offerings to satisfy the customer's needs.
name: 分析 问题s, requests, and inquiries

description: Routing customer inquiries in order to service them with the most apposite response. Direct customer inquires to the best suited personnel or system. Have a system or procedure capable of efficiently channeling these requests.
name: 解决 customer 问题s, requests, and inquiries

description: Responding to customer requests by email, conversation, interactive voice response, mail, etc. with the most appropriate reply. Instill a robust process to locate the right information for a solution to a customer's 问题.
name: Respond to customer 问题s, requests, and inquiries

description: Utilizing customer inquiries as opportunities to either provide a comparable service to the one in question, offer additional complimentary service, or suggest a service that is better than what was initially offered.
name: 识别 and capture upsell/cross-sell opportunities

description: Providing possible sales leads to the sales team in an effort to garner more business opportunities.
name: Deliver opportunity to sales team

description: Obtaining customer complaints online or by phone. Direct these complaints to higher-level representatives as appropriate. 解决 them. Respond to customers.
name: 管理 customer complaints

description: Receiving any complaints or grievances from customers for the organization's products/services. 接收 objections, complaints, and criticism from customers regarding products/services through email, telephone, online forms, text messages, social media, in person, etc. Dedicate equipment, systems, and personnel.
name: 接收 customer complaints

description: Routing any complaints or grievances received from customers in order to address them in the most appropriate manner. Direct complaints to the best suited personnel or system. 实施 a system or procedure capable of efficiently channeling the various objections, complaints, and criticism from customers over the offerings provided by the organization.
name: Route customer complaints

description: Resolving any customer complaints that are deemed to be sound and reasonable. Redress any objections, grievances, and complaints received from customers regarding the offerings provided by the organization. 识别 the legitimate complaints, where the situation needs to be appropriately corrected. 部署 personnel who can rectify the issue within a stipulated time frame.
name: 解决 customer complaints

description: Overseeing key back-office processes for organizations. This category includes process groups related to planning and management accounting, revenue accounting, general accounting and reporting, fixed-asset project accounting, payroll, accounts payable and expense reimbursements, treasury operations, internal controls, tax management, international funds/consolidation, and global trade services.
name: 管理财务资源

description: Determining different stages of the planning process and accounting. Classify, determine, analyze, interpret, and communicate information to make up-to-date business decisions for better management and control functions.
name: Perform planning and management accounting

description: Allocating funds to meet future and current financial goals. Led by the chief financial officer, have the finance function plan, budget, and forecast in order to determine and describe long and short-term financial goals.

description: Formulating financial budgetary guidelines and strategies. 开发 a framework for rules and regulations regarding budgets. 创建 a step-by-step process to achieve financial goals.

description: Creating reports on a quarterly or annual basis for fund allocation. 创建 a financial statement that estimates revenues and expenses over a specific period of time. (Leverage budget methods such as cost-based and zero-based budgeting techniques, in light of the periodic targets outlined during 开发 and maintain budget policies and procedures [10771].)
name: 准备 periodic budgets and plans

description: Creating estimates of the projected income and expenses required over a predetermined time frame. 开发 the projections of profit and loss statements, balance sheets, and the cash flow forecast.

description: Conducting a quantitative analysis between what was forecasted and budgeted and actual financial behavior.
name: Perform variance analysis against forecasts and budgets

Determine the costs of products, processes, projects, etc. to compile in the financial statements, as well as to assist management in making decisions regarding planning and control. 控制 costs by managing and reducing business expenses.

description: Conducting accounting for 资产, and finding reasons for 变更s (depreciation, obsolescence, deterioration, 变更 in customer taste, increased demand, decreased market supply, etc.).

description: Studying expenses directly associated with product. 分析 the cost of sales, which is the cost of manufacturing products.

description: Studying and finding out the relevant cost center for a product by studying every resource used in its making.
name: Perform product costing

description: Discovering the 变更s between forecasted and actual costing. 分析 actual and planned behavior by reviewing the amount of a variance on a trend line in order to maintain control over a business.
name: Perform variance analysis

description: Making a report about revenues generated by the organization or business unit concerned. This process requires the organization to create a report which shows how business is generating profits. Profits are the part which is left after paying all expenses directly related to the generation of the revenue, such as producing a product, and other expenses related to conducting business activities.
name: 报告 on profitability

description: Deciding which expenses can be avoided to reduce some costs and increase revenues. 规划 and control the organization's budget to forecast future expenditures.
name: Perform cost management

description: Defining cost drivers for a particular activity.
name: Determine key cost drivers

description: Calculating cost drivers.
name: Measure cost drivers

description: Determine the activities that hinder the progress of finance activities. This requires the organization to determine those business activities carried out by the financial function of the organization and which are indispensable. This undertaking helps the organization triangulate those activities which are essential and where costs cannot be slashed.
name: Determine critical activities

description: Distributing or allocating asset resources in different processes for optimal utilization.
name: 管理 asset resource 部署 and utilization

description: Checking and achieving predetermined financial targets and timelines. 评估 and manage the profitability, feasibility, and consistency of a business or project. Study the revenues generated.

description: Studying product demand and targeted customer preferences. Study customers' demands or preferences after deducting the cost of delivering the final product.
name: 评估 customer and product profitability

description: Checking demand about a specific product by a customer segment. 开展 a detailed study--or research a customer behavior or preference for a product--in order to determine its production and profitability in a specific market.
name: 评估 new products

description: Determining the cost of delivering an end product at different stages of production. Study the total life cycle of a product/process to determine how much revenue and production cost will be incurred at every stage in order to make strategic decisions.

description: Evaluating 绩效 based on different sets of activities created by management to measure 绩效.

description: Conducting activities to improve cost distribution regularly. Follow or adopt different ways of reducing costs.

description: Comparing revenue targets to reality. 审查 all transactions and entries passed in final accounts in a year in order to examine profits.
name: Perform revenue accounting

description: Evaluating and processing requests for advances. 评估 credit requests by customers requiring loans to buy products/services.

description: Creating guidelines for providing advances. Set up credit standards, credit terms, and collection policies.

description: Checking and accepting new requests based on eligibility criteria. 分析 the status of applicants and requirements to be met for a new account.

This process element requires the organization to maintain a database of customers and their purchases. Such a master-file can be used to ensure customer touch point, enhance customer satisfaction, explore cross selling opportunities, and identify future trends. This database will include several particulars about the personal details of the organization's customers and a tracking of the products being sold.

description: Checking and solving billing queries raised by customers.

description: Processing payments due from customers. This includes all processing of funds received, whether by check or electronically. This does not include the generation of invoices.

description: Preparing reports that detail balances due or what to collect from customers at a certain point in time.

description: Maintaining reserves for write-offs and adjustments. Adjust or write off certain expenses and losses.

description: Creating and providing funds for necessary adjustments and deductions, including all expenses that were required for the business at certain point in time.
name: 管理 and process adjustments/deductions

description: Creating guidelines to follow in case of adjustments to business processes.
name: 建立 policies/procedures for adjustments

description: Checking 变更s made in accounts during the year. Examine the alterations made in final accounts to rectify errors/omissions.
name: 分析 adjustments

description: Providing suitable offers to customers. Present different offers (e.g., discounts) available for customers or buyers.

description: Discussing and planning with internal parties (department heads, managers, and senior management) about rules to follow in coming months.

description: Recording business transactions as they occur in order to provide a balanced accounts for financial reporting.

description: Agreeing upon terms and conditions. Negotiate an agreement between two or more parties, the customer and service providers. Specify scope, 质量, and responsibilities.
